TL;DR: 本文研究了语言模型在结构化输出（如JSON格式）上的可靠性差距。发现普通提示（NAIVE）虽任务准确率可达85%，但输出准确率（同时满足正确性和格式要求）为0%。提出的AloLab迭代系统提示优化器，通过黑盒API访问就能将GSM8K输出准确率提升至84-87%，MATH上达34-40%，且延迟几乎不变，无需微调模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 部署的语言模型需要同时保证输出内容的正确性和格式合规性，但现有方法在这两方面存在巨大差距。作者希望系统性地研究这种结构化输出可靠性差距，并找到无需微调、不增加推理延迟的解决方案。

Method: 使用GSM8K和MATH两个数学基准作为受控测试平台，以输出准确率（数学正确性+有效JSON结构）为主要指标。评估三种7-9B模型在五种提示策略下的表现。提出AloLab——一个迭代式系统提示优化器（元智能体为Claude Sonnet 4.5），仅需目标模型的黑盒API访问权限。

Result: NAIVE提示在GSM8K上任务准确率最高达85%，但输出准确率为0%。约束解码可确保语法有效性，但延迟增加3.6-8.2倍，且在某些情况下显著降低任务性能。AloLab在GSM8K上达到84-87%，MATH上34-40%的输出准确率，29/30的McNemar检验显著优于最佳静态提示。在GPT-4o上，REFERENCE为0%，AloLab提升至95.2%。元智能体能力是优化质量的主要驱动因素。

Conclusion: 结构化输出的格式失败是系统性问题，普通提示和简单参考提示都无法解决。AloLab作为黑盒提示优化方法，能在不增加推理延迟和不需微调的情况下有效弥合这一差距，且优化质量高度依赖元智能体的能力。

Abstract: Deployed language models must produce outputs that are both correct and format-compliant. We study this structured-output reliability gap using two mathematical benchmarks -- GSM8K and MATH -- as a controlled testbed: ground truth is unambiguous and the output contract is strict (JSON with required fields). We evaluate three 7-9B models under five prompting strategies and report output accuracy -- the joint event of mathematical correctness and valid JSON structure -- as the primary metric. A systematic format failure emerges: NAIVE prompting (no system prompt) achieves up to 85% task accuracy on GSM8K but 0% output accuracy across all models and datasets. REFERENCE prompting (a minimal hand-written JSON format prompt) fares little better, yielding 0% output accuracy for two of four models tested. Constrained decoding enforces syntactic validity but incurs 3.6x-8.2x latency overhead and in several settings degrades task performance substantially. To overcome this limitation, we developed AloLab, an iterative system-prompt optimizer (meta-agent: Claude Sonnet 4.5) requiring only black-box API access to the target model; it reaches 84-87% output accuracy on GSM8K and 34-40% on MATH across five independent runs per model, with 29/30 paired McNemar comparisons against the best static prompt significant at p < 0.05, at near-NAIVE inference latency and without model fine-tuning. The same format failure extends to GPT-4o (OpenAI, 2024), a proprietary closed-source model: REFERENCE achieves 0% output accuracy due to systematic markdown-fence wrapping, while AloLab reaches 95.2% [94.8, 95.6]. An ablation replacing the Sonnet 4.5 meta-agent with Claude 3 Haiku reduces mean output accuracy to 61.0% and increases run-to-run standard deviation from <1 pp to 21.8 pp, confirming that meta-agent capability is a primary driver of optimization quality.

</details>


### [296] [InfoLaw: Information Scaling Laws for Large Language Models with Quality-Weighted Mixture Data and Repetition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02364)
*Fengze Liu,Weidong Zhou,Binbin Liu,Ping Guo,Zijun Wang,Bingni Zhang,Yifan Zhang,Yifeng Yu,Xiaohuan Zhou,Taifeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出InfoLaw（信息缩放定律），一个数据感知的缩放框架，通过将预训练建模为信息积累过程，能够预测不同数据配比、模型大小和重复训练下的损失，实现高效的数据配方选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有缩放定律无法可靠地跨数据混合配比或重复训练进行外推，导致在数据有限（尤其是过度训练）的情况下，最优数据配比的选择成为欠定问题。

Method: 将预训练建模为信息积累过程，质量控制信息密度，重复训练带来随规模递减的收益。通过收集不同规模、质量分布和重复训练级别的模型性能数据，建立信息模型来预测性能。

Result: 在未见过的数据配方和更大规模运行（最高7B参数、425B tokens）上，损失的平均绝对误差为0.15%，最大绝对误差为0.96%，并能可靠地外推至不同过度训练水平。

Conclusion: InfoLaw能够在不同计算预算下高效选择数据配方，解决了数据有限场景下缩放定律无法外推的问题。

Abstract: Upweighting high-quality data in LLM pretraining often improves performance, but in datalimited regimes, especially under overtraining, stronger upweighting increases repetition and can degrade performance. However, standard scaling laws do not reliably extrapolate across mixture recipes or under repetitions, making the selection for optimal data recipes at scaling underdetermined. To solve this, we introduce InfoLaw (Information Scaling Laws), a data-aware scaling framework that predicts loss from consumed tokens, model size, data mixture weights, and repetition. The key idea is to model pretraining as information accumulation, where quality controls information density and repetition induces scaledependent diminishing returns. We first collect the model performance after training on datasets that vary in scale, quality distribution, and repetition level. Then we build up the modeling for information so that information accurately predicts those model performance. InfoLaw predicts performance on unseen data recipes and larger scale runs (up to 7B, 425B tokens) with 0.15% mean and 0.96% max absolute error in loss, and it extrapolates reliably across overtraining levels, enabling efficient data-recipe selection under varying compute budgets.

</details>


### [297] [Is It Novel and Why? Fine-Grained Patent Novelty Prediction Based on Passage Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02392)
*Valentin Knappich,Anna Hätty,Simon Razniewski,Annemarie Friedrich*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了FiNE-Patents数据集，将专利新颖性评估从粗粒度的二分类任务转变为细粒度的特征级检索与推理任务，并验证了LLM工作流在此任务上的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有专利新颖性预测被简化为权利要求级别的二分类任务，这易受虚假相关性影响且缺乏实际应用所需的粒度。

Method: 构建FiNE-Patents数据集（3,658份第一权利要求，标注了特征级在先技术引用）；提出将评估范式转为联合检索与抽象推理任务；设计LLM工作流将权利要求分解为特征，逐特征分析在先技术，最终得出权利要求级新颖性预测。

Result: LLM工作流在段落检索和新颖特征识别上优于基于嵌入的基线；与训练的分类器不同，LLMs对权利要求级分类中的虚假相关性具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 细粒度的特征级分析比粗粒度的二分类更适合专利新颖性评估，LLM方法在此任务上表现更优且更鲁棒。

Abstract: Novelty assessment is a critical yet complex task in the examination process for patent acceptance, requiring examiners to determine whether an invention is disclosed in a prior art document. The process involves intricate matching between specific features of a patent claim and passages in the prior art. While prior work has approached novelty prediction primarily as a binary classification task at the claim level, we argue that this formulation is susceptible to spurious correlations and lacks the granularity required for practical application. In this work, we introduce FiNE-Patents (Fine-grained Novelty Examination of Patents), a novel dataset comprising 3,658 first patent claims annotated with fine-grained, feature-level prior art references extracted from European Search Opinion (ESOP) documents. We propose shifting the evaluation paradigm from simple binary classification to a joint retrieval and abstract reasoning task at the feature level, requiring models to identify specific passages from a prior art document that disclose individual claim features, and to identify which features of a claim make it novel. We implement and evaluate LLM-based workflows that decompose claims into features, analyze each feature against prior art, and finally derive a claim-level novelty prediction. Our experiments demonstrate that these workflows outperform embedding-based baselines on passage retrieval and novel feature identification. Furthermore, we show that unlike trained classifiers, LLMs are robust against spurious correlations present in the claim-level novelty classification task. We release the dataset and code to foster further research into transparent and granular patent analysis.

</details>


### [298] [Automatic Reflection Level Classification in Hungarian Student Essays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02402)
*Zsolt Csibi,Mónika Sándor,Mónika Serfőző,Kinga Gyöngy,Kristian Fenech*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了匈牙利语学生反思性作文的自动反思水平分类问题，使用1,954篇专家标注的四级反思数据集，比较了传统机器学习（TF-IDF/语义嵌入）与匈牙利语专用Transformer模型，并系统应对类别不平衡问题。结果显示传统方法综合得分达71%，Transformer模型得分68%但在少数类上泛化更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反思性思维是教育中的关键能力，但评估反思性写作对教育专家而言既耗时又主观。尽管多个语言已探索自动化反思分析，匈牙利语在此领域缺乏深入研究。

Method: 使用1,954篇匈牙利语反思性作文数据集（四级标注），采用两类方法：(1) 基于TF-IDF和语义嵌入特征的经典机器学习模型；(2) 匈牙利语专用Transformer微调模型。针对类别不平衡，系统研究了类别加权、过采样、数据增强和替代损失函数，并进行了消融实验。

Result: 传统机器学习模型综合得分（准确率、F1、ROC AUC平均）达71%，Transformer模型得分68%。但Transformer在少数反思类别上表现出更好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 经典方法在低资源场景下仍具相关性，Transformer模型在不平衡分类任务中更具鲁棒性。该数据集和实验见解为匈牙利语及其他形态丰富语言的自动化反思分析研究奠定了坚实基础。

Abstract: Reflective thinking is a key competency in education, but assessing reflective writing remains a time-consuming and subjective task for education experts. While automated reflective analysis has been explored in several languages, Hungarian language was not researched extensively. In this paper, we present the first comprehensive study on automatic reflection level classification in Hungarian student essays. We used a large, expert-annotated Hungarian dataset consisting of 1,954 reflective essays collected over multiple academic years and labeled on a four-level reflection scale. We investigate two approaches: (1) classical machine learning models using TF-IDF and semantic embedding features, and (2) Hungarian-specific transformer models fine-tuned for document-level reflection classification. To address the strong class imbalance in the dataset, we systematically examine class weighting, oversampling, data augmentation, and alternative loss functions. An extensive ablation study is conducted to analyze the contribution of each modeling and balancing strategy. Our results show that shallow machine learning models with appropriate feature engineering achieve strong overall performance, reaching up to 71% overall score averaged over accuracy, F1-score, and ROC AUC metrics, while transformer-based models achieve slightly lower overall score (68%) averaged over the same metrics, but demonstrate better generalization on minority reflection classes. These findings highlight the continued relevance of classical methods for low-resource settings and the robustness of transformer models for imbalanced classification. The proposed dataset and experimental insights provide a solid foundation for future research on automated reflective analysis in Hungarian and other morphologically rich languages.

</details>


### [299] [HalluScan: A Systematic Benchmark for Detecting and Mitigating Hallucinations in Instruction-Following LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02443)
*Ahmed Cherif*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出HalluScan基准框架，系统评估6种幻觉检测方法、4个模型家族和3个领域共72种配置。贡献包括：HalluScore复合指标（与人类判断相关系数r=0.41）、自适应检测路由算法（成本降低2.0倍，AUROC仅下降0.1%），以及系统性的错误级联分解。实验表明NLI验证方法取得最高AUROC（0.88），RAV方法次之（0.66）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型存在幻觉问题（生成事实错误、不忠实于上下文或不符合用户指令的内容），缺乏系统性的幻觉检测与缓解评估基准。

Method: 构建HalluScan基准框架，覆盖6种检测方法、4个开放权重模型家族、3个领域共72种配置；提出HalluScore复合评估指标、自适应检测路由算法（ADR）和错误级联分解方法。

Result: HalluScore与人类专家判断的Pearson相关系数为0.41；ADR实现2.0倍成本降低，AUROC仅下降0.1%；NLI验证方法取得最高AUROC（0.88），RAV方法次之（0.66）；不同领域的幻觉错误类型存在显著差异。

Conclusion: 本文提供了系统化的幻觉检测评估框架，为不同场景选择最优检测方法提供了指导，同时在检测效率与性能之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse natural language processing tasks, yet they remain susceptible to hallucinations -- generating content that is factually incorrect, unfaithful to provided context, or misaligned with user instructions. We present HalluScan, a comprehensive benchmark framework that systematically evaluates hallucination detection and mitigation across 72 configurations spanning 6 detection methods, 4 open-weight model families, and 3 diverse domains. We introduce three key contributions: (1) HalluScore, a novel composite metric that achieves a Pearson correlation of r = 0.41 with human expert judgments; (2) Adaptive Detection Routing (ADR), an intelligent routing algorithm achieving 2.0x cost reduction with only 0.1% AUROC degradation; and (3) systematic error cascade decomposition revealing substantial variation in hallucination error types across domains. Our experiments reveal that NLI Verification achieves the highest overall AUROC of 0.88, while RAV achieves the second-highest AUROC of 0.66.

</details>


### [300] [PC-MNet: Dual-Level Congruity Modeling for Multimodal Sarcasm Detection via Polarity-Modulated Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02447)
*Maoheng Li,Ling Zhou,Xiaohua Huang,Rubing Huang,Wenming Zheng,Guoying Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于标量一致性路由机制和先验引导上下文图的多模态讽刺检测方法，通过两阶段非对称优化和不一致感知对比学习，在MUStARD基准上实现3.14%的Macro-F1提升，为建模人类沟通中的语用不协调提供了鲁棒的解耦范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖朴素的基于相似性的注意力机制和统一的晚期融合策略，存在功能纠缠问题，无法有效捕捉多模态之间的语用不一致性。

Method: 1）标量一致性路由机制（scalar congruity routing）；2）先验引导的上下文图（prior-guided contextual graph）；3）两阶段非对称优化（two-stage asymmetric optimization）；4）不一致感知对比学习（inconsistency-aware contrastive learning），选择性融合最具判别力的多粒度证据。

Result: 在MUStARD基准及其消除伪相关的平衡数据集上达到新SOTA，比最强多模态基线Macro-F1提升3.14%。

Conclusion: 通过架构上隔离原子冲突、组合冲突和上下文冲突，为建模人类沟通中的细微语用不协调提供了鲁棒的解耦范式。

Abstract: Multimodal sarcasm detection, which aims to precisely identify pragmatic incongruities between literal text and nonverbal cues, has gained substantial attention in multimodal understanding. Recent advancements have predominantly relied on naïve similarity-based attention mechanisms and uniform late fusion strategies.Furthermore, given that functional entanglement restricts traditional late fusions, we incorporate a scalar congruity routing mechanism and a prior-guided contextual graph. This mechanism anchors a generalized incongruity manifold through a two-stage asymmetric optimization driven by inconsistency-aware contrastive learning, selectively fusing only the most discriminative multi-granularity evidence. Extensive experiments on the \texttt{MUStARD} benchmark and its spurious-correlation-mitigated balanced datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the strongest multimodal baseline by a substantial 3.14\% improvement in Macro-F1. By architecturally isolating atomic, composition, and contextual conflicts. This work provides a robust, decoupled paradigm for modeling subtle pragmatic incongruities in human communication.

</details>


### [301] [Leveraging Argument Structure to Predict Content Hatefulness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02457)
*Nicolas Benjamin Ocampo,Davide Ceolin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探討論證結構（前提與結論）如何幫助識別白人民族主義論壇訊息中的仇恨內容，並在WSF-ARG+資料集上達到96% F1分數的成效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 資訊失序（含假訊息、仇恨言論等）是嚴重的社會問題，作者希望找到能連結這些不同問題面向的共同分析框架。

Method: 使用WSF-ARG+資料集（白人民族主義論壇訊息，含論證結構與可檢核性、仇恨性標註），透過論證元件的仇恨性標註來推論整則訊息的仇恨程度。

Result: 達到96% F1分數，顯示論證結構分析在仇恨內容識別上具有潛力。

Conclusion: 論證結構能有效連結不同資訊失序問題面向，未來可擴展此方向以應對仇恨內容識別與資訊失序問題。

Abstract: Information disorder is a challenging phenomenon that affects society at large. This phenomenon entails the diffusion of misleading, misinforming, and hateful content online. In different contexts, one aspect of the problem may prevail, but overall, this is a broad problem that requires comprehensive solutions. While each dimension of the problem (hate speech, disinformation, misinformation, etc.) requires in-depth analysis, in this paper, we look into the possibility of argument structure to provide relevant information to link these different areas of the problem. In particular, we focus on the WSF-ARG+ dataset, which consists of white supremacy forum messages annotated in terms of argument structure (premises and conclusion). There, we leverage the checkworthiness and hatefulness annotations of the argument components to obtain insights into the hatefulness of the whole message. Our results show promising insights (up to 96% F1), indicating the possibility of extending this direction in the future to tackle hateful content identification and information disorder countering.

</details>


### [302] [ATLAS: Article Tracking, Linking, and Analysis of Swedish Encyclopedias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02466)
*Albin Andersson,Salam Jonasson,Fredrik Wastring,Pierre Nugues*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个自动化流水线，用于恢复数字化百科全书的文本结构，包括提取词条、分类实体、跨版本匹配以及与Wikidata链接。作者将其应用于瑞典百科全书《Nordisk familjebok》的四个主要版本，取得了良好的效果（词条提取F1=97.8%，分类F1=93.4%等）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旧百科全书数字化后通常只做OCR，文本结构未被利用，导致难以追踪不同版本间的知识演变。因此，需要一种自动化的方法来恢复结构化的文本信息。

Method: 构建了一个包含四个步骤的流水线：1）提取词条并识别条目边界；2）对实体进行分类；3）跨版本匹配条目；4）将条目链接到Wikidata条目。该方法应用于瑞典百科全书《Nordisk familjebok》的四个版本。

Result: 词条提取F1=97.8%，词条分类F1=93.4%。小规模评估中，跨版本匹配精确率93%，Wikidata链接精确率85%、召回率16.5%。

Conclusion: 研究表明，自动化处理数字化历史知识是可行的，有助于知识保存和理解知识传播。数据集和程序已开源。

Abstract: The digitization of old encyclopedias represents an important step to improve access to historically structured knowledge. Often, however, this process does not go beyond an optical character recognition, leaving all the underlying structure unexploited. In addition, many encyclopedias had multiple editions reflecting the evolution of knowledge. The lack of structure in the raw text makes it difficult to track changes across these editions. In this work, we built a pipeline to restore the text structure, where we extract the headwords and identify entries; categorize the entities; match entries across editions; and link entries to a Wikidata item. We applied this pipeline to the four major editions of \textit{Nordisk familjebok}, an authoritative Swedish encyclopedia published between 1876 and 1951. We could extract the headwords with an F1 score of 97.8\% and we obtained an F1 score of 93.4\% on the headword classification. On a small-scale evaluation, we reached a 93\% precision on the cross-edition matching, 85\% precision and 16.5\% recall on the Wikidata linking. This shows that an automated approach to digitized historical knowledge is possible. This should facilitate the preservation of general knowledge and the understanding of knowledge transmission. The datasets and programs are available online.

</details>


### [303] [Accurate Legal Reasoning at Scale: Neuro-Symbolic Offloading and Structural Auditability for Robust Legal Adjudication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02472)
*Stanisław Sójka,Witold Kowalczyk*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出"摊销智能"（Amortized Intelligence）方法，通过一次性使用LLM将法律文本翻译为确定性自主合约语言（DACL）中间表示，再利用图执行引擎进行裁决，在降低90%以上计算成本的同时，实现了接近完美的推理一致性，避免了概率模型的"推理悬崖"问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律文本中的计算性法律条款需要复杂逻辑理解，前沿大推理模型（LRM）虽能描述这些条款，但在生产级系统中存在推理错误率高、推理成本昂贵的问题，亟需一种既可靠又经济的解决方案。

Method: 提出Amortized Intelligence（摊销智能）方法，采用神经符号主义（neuro-symbolic）框架：仅用一次LLM调用将法律文本翻译为DACL（确定性自主合约语言）——一种类型化的图中间表示；后续裁决过程依赖确定性图执行，并生成可视化可审计的执行轨迹。

Result: 与GPT-5.2、Gemini 3 Pro等前沿LRM基线相比，基于DACL的Agent实现了接近完美的推理一致性，有效缓解了概率模型的"推理悬崖"问题；在高吞吐量工作流中计算成本降低超过90%。

Conclusion: 该方法在满足法律裁决严格可审计性要求的同时，显著提升了推理可靠性与经济性，为法律文本自动化处理提供了一条可行的生产级路径。

Abstract: Legal texts often contain computational legal clauses--provisions whose understanding requires complex logic. While frontier Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) can describe such clauses, building production-ready systems is limited by reasoning errors and the high cost of inference. We propose Amortized Intelligence, a neuro-symbolic approach where we use an LLM once to translate a legal text into Deterministic Autonomous Contract Language (DACL): a typed graph intermediate representation. Adjudication then relies on deterministic graph executions with a visually auditable trace. In comparison against runtime LRM baselines (including GPT-5.2 and Gemini 3 Pro), our DACL-based Agent achieves near-perfect consistency and mitigates the "reasoning cliff" observed in probabilistic models. The system reduces compute costs by over 90% in high-volume workflows while satisfying the strict auditability requirements of legal adjudication.

</details>


### [304] [A multilingual hallucination benchmark: MultiWikiQHalluA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02504)
*Freja Thoresen,Dan Saattrup Smart*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了306种语言的幻觉现象，发现低资源语言（如冰岛语）的幻觉率显著高于高资源语言（如英语），且小模型（Qwen3-0.6B）的幻觉率高达60%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有幻觉评测主要集中在英语上，不清楚低资源语言中的幻觉现象是否与英语一致。

Method: 利用MultiWikiQA数据集和LettuceDetect框架生成306种语言的合成幻觉数据集，训练30种欧洲语言的token级幻觉分类器，评估5种模型在4种语言上的幻觉率。

Result: Qwen3-0.6B幻觉率最高（冰岛语达60%），大模型表现更好；低资源语言幻觉率普遍更高。

Conclusion: 模型规模越大幻觉率越低，低资源语言的幻觉问题更严重，需要更多关注多语言幻觉评估。

Abstract: Most hallucination evaluations focus on English, leaving it unclear whether findings transfer to lower-resource languages. We investigate faithfulness hallucinations, defined as model-generated content that is fluent and plausible but diverges from the provided input or is internally inconsistent. Leveraging the multilingual MultiWikiQA dataset, we utilize the LettuceDetect framework to create synthetic hallucination datasets for 306 languages, from which we train token-level hallucination classifiers for 30 European languages. In this work, we present evaluations of model hallucinations on a selection of languages: English, Danish, German, and Icelandic. Using these classifiers, we evaluate the hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-14B, Gemma-3-12B-IT, cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B, and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B. Our classifiers reveal notably higher hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B (up to 60\% of answers containing at least one hallucination, peaking in Icelandic) and generally lower rates for larger models, with cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B performing best on most languages. Hallucination rates are consistently higher for lower-resource languages, particularly Icelandic.

</details>


### [305] [Revisiting Semantic Role Labeling: Efficient Structured Inference with Dependency-Informed Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02505)
*Sangpil Youm,Leah Jones,Bonnie J. Dorr*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个现代化的编码器框架用于语义角色标注（SRL），在保持显式谓词-论元结构的同时实现10倍推理加速，并在BERT、RoBERTa、DeBERTa上取得可比或更优性能。通过依存关系诊断方法分析LLM的结构稳定性，并展示该框架在多语言SRL投影中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM依赖隐式语义表示，缺乏显式结构约束和系统性解释机制；传统SRL系统（如AllenNLP）已进入维护模式，无法兼容现代编码器架构和推理需求。

Method: 提出一个现代化编码器框架，保留显式谓词-论元结构；采用依存关系诊断方法进行跨度级不一致性分析和LLM表示级分析；在BERT、RoBERTa、DeBERTa上验证；应用于多语言SRL投影。

Result: 推理速度提升10倍；BERT-base达到可比性能；RoBERTa和DeBERTa进一步提升F1；依存线索主要改善结构稳定性。

Conclusion: 该框架在保持显式结构的同时实现了高效推理，验证了依存线索对结构稳定性的提升作用，并展示了在多语言场景下的实用性。

Abstract: Semantic Role Labeling (SRL) provides an explicit representation of predicate-argument structure, capturing linguistically grounded relations such as who did what to whom. While recent NLP progress has been dominated by large language models (LLMs), these systems often rely on implicit semantic representations, often lacking explicit structural constraints and systematic explanatory mechanisms. Traditionally, SRL systems have often relied on AllenNLP; however, the framework entered maintenance mode in December 2022, limiting compatibility with evolving encoder architectures and modern inference requirements. We revisit structured SRL modeling, introducing a modernized encoder-based framework that preserves explicit predicate-argument structure while enabling inference 10 times faster. Using BERT-base, the model attains comparable predictive performance, and RoBERTa and DeBERTa further improve F1 performance within the same framework. We adopt a dependency-informed diagnostic methodology to characterize span-level inconsistencies and conduct a representation-level analysis of LLM behavior under dependency-informed structural signals. Results indicate that dependency cues primarily improve structural stability. Finally, we illustrate how the framework's explicit predicate-argument structure can support multilingual SRL projection as a downstream application.

</details>


### [306] [Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Biomedical Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Controlled Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02520)
*Devi Prasad Bal,Subhashree Puhan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文在生物医学问答RAG管道中系统比较了五种检索策略（稠密向量检索、混合BM25+稠密检索、交叉编码器重排序、多查询扩展和最大边际相关性），以GPT-4o-mini为固定生成模型，在BioASQ基准的250个问答对上使用四个DeepEval指标评估。交叉编码器重排序以0.827的综合得分表现最佳，而所有RAG策略均显著优于无上下文消融实验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高风险的生物医学领域，不同RAG检索策略的效果尚缺乏受控的、多指标的系统性比较研究，现有工作未能在统一条件下公平评估各策略的实际表现。

Method: 固定生成模型（GPT-4o-mini）、向量存储（ChromaDB）和嵌入模型（text-embedding-3-small），在250个BioASQ问答对上对比五种检索策略，使用DeepEval的四个指标（上下文精确度、上下文召回率、忠实性和答案相关性）进行评估，含95%置信区间和无上下文消融基线。

Result: 交叉编码器重排序综合得分最高（0.827），上下文精确度最高（0.852）；稠密基线排第二（0.822）；多查询扩展上下文精确度最差（0.671）；MMR牺牲答案相关性换取多样性；所有RAG条件答案相关性（0.658-0.701）远优于无上下文消融（0.287）。

Conclusion: 交叉编码器重排序在生物医学RAG中效果最优，查询-文档交互能带来可衡量的检索增益；简单查询多样化可能引入噪声；稠密检索作为基线已表现强劲；检索环节对RAG性能至关重要。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a well-established path to grounding large language model (LLM) outputs in external knowledge, yet the question of which retrieval strategy works best in a high-stakes domain such as biomedicine has not received the controlled, multi-metric treatment it deserves. This paper presents a systematic empirical comparison of five retrieval strategies -- Dense Vector Search, Hybrid BM25 + Dense retrieval, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Multi-Query Expansion, and Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) -- within a biomedical question-answering RAG pipeline. All strategies share a fixed generation model (GPT-4o-mini), a common vector store (ChromaDB), and OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small embeddings, ensuring that observed differences are attributable to retrieval alone. Evaluation is conducted on 250 question-answer pairs drawn from a preprocessed subset of the BioASQ benchmark (rag-mini-bioasq) using four DeepEval metrics: contextual precision, contextual recall, faithfulness, and answer relevancy, each reported with 95% confidence intervals. A no-context ablation is included as a lower bound. Cross-Encoder Reranking achieves the best composite score (0.827) and highest contextual precision (0.852), confirming that query-document interaction yields measurable retrieval gains. Multi-Query Expansion, despite its recall-oriented design, produces the weakest contextual precision (0.671), suggesting naive query diversification introduces retrieval noise. MMR sacrifices answer relevancy for diversity, while the Dense baseline (composite 0.822) falls within 0.005 points of the top strategy. All RAG conditions dramatically outperform the no-context ablation on answer relevancy (0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287), confirming the practical value of retrieval. The full pipeline, hyperparameters, and evaluation code are publicly available.

</details>


### [307] [SemEval-2026 Task 7: Everyday Knowledge Across Diverse Languages and Cultures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02601)
*Nedjma Ousidhoum,Junho Myung,Carla Perez-Almendros,Jiho Jin,Amr Keleg,Meriem Beloucif,Yi Zhou,Rodrigo Agerri,Vladimir Araujo,Naomi Baes,James Barry,Joanne Boisson,Nancy F. Chen,Christine de Kock,Aleksandra Edwards,Joseba Fernandez de Landa,Mohamed Fazli Imam,Huda Hakami,Shu-Kai Hsieh,Joseph Marvin Imperial,Roy Ka-Wei Lee,Zhengyuan Liu,Chenyang Lyu,Younes Samih,Johan Sjons,Bryan Tan,Asahi Ushio,Weihua Zheng,Alice Oh,Jose Camacho-Collados*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了跨语言文化LLM适应性的共享任务，基于扩展版BLEnD基准（30+语言-文化对，以低资源语言为主），严格仅用于评估。两个赛道（简答和选择题）吸引140+注册、62团队提交、19篇系统描述论文。报告最佳系统及常见方法，并讨论低资源语言评估、错位和方法论方面的挑战与洞见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估LLM和NLP系统在多种语言和文化上的适应性，特别是低资源语言和代表性不足的文化，弥补现有评估基准在语言-文化多样性上的空白。

Method: 基于扩展版BLEnD基准（30+语言-文化对），设置简答题（SAQ）和选择题（MCQ）两个赛道，严格限定基准仅用于评估（禁止训练/微调/少样本学习），参与者可提交任意NLP系统并采用多样化建模策略。

Result: 140+注册，62团队提交最终结果，19篇系统描述论文。报告了最佳系统的表现和主流方法分析。

Conclusion: 讨论了低资源语言和代表性文化评估中的开放问题与挑战，包括评估方法、模型错位以及方法论视角下的模型行为。

Abstract: We present our shared task on evaluating the adaptability of LLMs and NLP systems across multiple languages and cultures. The task data consist of an extended version of our manually constructed BLEnD benchmark (Myung et al. 2024), covering more than 30 language-culture pairs, predominantly representing low-resource languages spoken across multiple continents. As the task is designed strictly for evaluation, participants were not permitted to use the data for training, fine-tuning, few-shot learning, or any other form of model modification. Our task includes two tracks: (a) Short-Answer Questions (SAQ) and (b) Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQ). Participants were required to predict labels and were allowed to submit any NLP system and adopt diverse modelling strategies, provided that the benchmark was used solely for evaluation. The task attracted more than 140 registered participants, and we received final submissions from 62 teams, along with 19 system description papers. We report the results and present an analysis of the best-performing systems and the most commonly adopted approaches. Furthermore, we discuss shared insights into open questions and challenges related to evaluation, misalignment, and methodological perspectives on model behaviour in low-resource languages and for under-represented cultures.

</details>


### [308] [Dependency Parsing Across the Resource Spectrum: Evaluating Architectures on High and Low-Resource Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02608)
*Kevin Guan,Happy Buzaaba,Christiane Fellbaum*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 在低资源环境下，Biaffine LSTM解析器表现优于Transformer模型，后者需要足够的标注数据才能发挥优势，且形态复杂度是影响Transformer相对劣势的次要因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Transformer模型在低资源语言（尤其是非洲语言）的依存句法分析中是否仍优于简单架构，填补对该问题理解的空白。

Method: 在10种类型多样的语言上评估4种解析器（Biaffine LSTM、Stack-Pointer Network、AfroXLMR-large、RemBERT），重点关注低资源非洲语言，并分析语料库规模与形态复杂度（MATTR）的影响。

Result: Biaffine LSTM在低资源场景下持续优于Transformer模型；Transformer的优势在训练数据增加后才恢复，交叉点处于低资源树库的典型规模范围内；形态复杂度是除语料规模外显著的次要预测因子。

Conclusion: 在低资源环境下，Biaffine LSTM更适合用于句法工具开发，直到拥有足够的标注数据以利用预训练Transformer的表征能力。

Abstract: Transformer-based models achieve state-of-the-art dependency parsing for high-resource languages, yet their advantage over simpler architectures in low-resource settings remains poorly understood. We evaluate four parsers -- the Biaffine LSTM, Stack-Pointer Network, AfroXLMR-large, and RemBERT -- across ten typologically diverse languages, with a focus on low-resource African languages. We find that the Biaffine LSTM consistently outperforms transformer models in low-resource regimes, with transformers recovering their advantage as training data increases. The crossover falls within a resource range typical of treebanks for under-resourced languages. Morphological complexity (measured via MATTR) emerges as a significant secondary predictor of transformers' relative disadvantage after controlling for corpus size. These results indicate that the Biaffine LSTM may be better suited for syntactic tool development in low-resource regimes until sufficient annotated data is available to leverage the representational capacity of pre-trained transformers.

</details>


### [309] [Beating the Style Detector: Three Hours of Agentic Research on the AI-Text Arms Race](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02620)
*Andreas Maier,Moritz Zaiss,Siming Bayer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究利用自动化研究框架成功复现了ACL 2026关于个人风格后编辑的研究，发现GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7在风格模仿上超越人类后编辑，并展示了LLM在面对已知检测器时可通过迭代优化降低被检测概率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NLP实证研究复现耗时数周，作者希望通过自动化研究框架（agentic-research harness）大幅提升研究效率，并探索LLM在风格模仿与AI文本检测对抗中的能力边界。

Method: 使用现代自动化研究框架，以人类研究者作为"评审人在回路"（reviewer-in-the-loop），复现并扩展了一项关于个人风格后编辑LLM草稿的研究。采用无泄漏的保留协议，利用LUAR-MUD嵌入进行风格相似度测量，并使用线性SVM进行AI文本检测，最后通过T=20轮反馈迭代进行对抗性风格迁移。

Result: 成功复现所有七个预注册假设，核心相关性结果精确到小数点后三位（r=+0.244, p<10⁻⁸, n=648）。GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7分别缩小了71%-75%的风格差距，而人类后编辑仅缩小24%。在AI检测方面，SVM的AUC达到0.93-1.00；经20轮迭代后，Opus代理成功将两个样本翻转至人类半空间。

Conclusion: 前沿LLM在面对已知检测器时，通过适度努力即可有效降低自身被AI检测的概率，表明AI文本检测面临持续的对抗性挑战。所有代码、数据、检测器及对抗轨迹均已开源。

Abstract: Reproducing an empirical NLP study used to take weeks. Given the released data and a modern agentic-research harness, we redo every experiment of a recent ACL\,2026 study on personal-style post-editing of LLM drafts -- and add three new ones -- with the human investigator acting only as a reviewer-in-the-loop. We reproduce all seven preregistered hypotheses and recover the paper's headline correlation between perceived self-similarity and embedding-measured self-similarity to three decimal places ($r{=}{+}0.244$, $p{<}10^{-8}$, $n{=}648$). Under a leakage-free held-out protocol, GPT-5.5 and Claude\,Opus\,4.7 close $71$--$75\,\%$ of the style gap to the same-author ceiling on $324$ paired tasks, against $24\,\%$ for the human post-edit, and beat the human post-edit on $\sim$$80\,\%$ of tasks. We then frame the same data as an AI-text detection arms race. A leave-authors-out linear SVM on LUAR-MUD embeddings reaches AUC $0.93$--$1.00$ across approaches; six diagnostics show that GPT-5.5 detection is mostly a length confound while Opus detection is a genuine stylistic signature. Given $T{=}20$ feedback iterations against the frozen detector, an Opus agent flips two of five held-out test mimics to the human half-space and shrinks every margin by an order of magnitude. With moderate effort against a known detector, a frontier LLM can already efficiently lower its own AI-detection probability. All code, $648$ mimic drafts, trained detectors, diagnostics, and adversarial trajectories are released.

</details>


### [310] [Synthetic Users, Real Differences: an Evaluation Framework for User Simulation in Multi-Turn Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02624)
*Yu Lu Liu,Hyokun Yun,Tanya Roosta,Ziang Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RealSim评估框架，从8个维度（交际功能、用户状态、表面形式）对真实与模拟用户-聊天机器人对话进行分布级对比，发现模拟用户难以捕捉真实沟通摩擦，且不同领域表现存在差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模拟用户对话真实性的评估方法粒度粗糙，仅停留在单轮对话层面，缺乏系统性、多维度的分布级评估工具。

Method: 构建RealSim评估框架，从8个维度（交际功能、用户状态、表面形式）对真实与模拟对话进行分布级对比分析；并创建包含1K多轮任务导向对话（覆盖16个领域）的基准数据集。

Result: 模拟用户难以复现真实用户引入的沟通摩擦，导致评估结果过于乐观；不同领域间模拟效果差异显著。

Conclusion: 需关注模拟用户真实性的多维评估，未来可能需要领域特定的用户模拟器。

Abstract: There is growing interest in exploring user simulation as an alternative to gathering and scoring real user-chatbot interactions for AI chatbot evaluation. For this purpose, it is important to ensure the realism of the simulation, i.e., the extent to which simulated dialogues reflect real dialogues users have with chatbots. Most existing methods evaluating simulation realism produce coarse quality signal and remain solely at the level of individual dialogues. To support more rigorous evaluation in this area, we propose realsim, an evaluation framework that enables practitioners to take a distributional view of real vs. simulated dialogues along 8 dimensions, covering attributes related to the communicative functions of the interaction, user states, and the surface form of user messages. We then instantiate the framework with a curated dataset of 1K multi-turn task-focused real user-chatbot dialogues that cover 16 domains of chatbot applications. Overall, we find that simulated users tend to struggle at capturing communication frictions that real users introduce to interactions, which could make evaluations based on such simulations overly optimistic. We also observe variability in performance across different domains, which may indicate a need for domain-specific user simulators.

</details>


### [311] [ContextualJailbreak: Evolutionary Red-Teaming via Simulated Conversational Priming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02647)
*Mario Rodríguez Béjar,Francisco J. Cortés-Delgado,S. Braghin,Jose L. Hernández-Ramos*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ContextualJailbreak，一种基于进化搜索的黑盒红队策略，通过多轮对话上下文诱导（语境启动）绕过LLM安全对齐。该方法使用0-5分级的伤害评分作为搜索信号，结合五种语义突变算子（包括两种新算子）在50个HarmBench行为上达到90-100%的攻击成功率，且攻击可迁移至闭源前沿模型（GPT-5、Gemini-3-Flash等），但发现不同提供商（如Claude系列）的对齐鲁棒性存在显著不对称性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动优化红队测试局限于单轮场景，无法利用对话上下文的诱导效应；而多轮手工设计的攻击虽有效但缺乏自动化搜索机制，突变算子设计空间尚未被探索。

Method: 采用黑盒进化搜索，在模拟的多轮诱导对话上进行迭代优化；使用两级裁判（two-level judge）给出0-5分伤害评分作为搜索反馈信号；定义了五种语义突变算子：角色扮演、场景、扩展、故障排除和机制解释（后两者为本文新贡献）。

Result: 在50个HarmBench行为上，对gpt-oss:20B/llama3.1:70B/qwen3-8B均达100% ASR，对gpt-oss:120B达90%；迁移至GPT-5达70%、gemini-3-flash达70%，但claude-opus-4-7仅17.5%、claude-sonnet-4-6仅15%。

Conclusion: 多轮语境启动是一种强大的攻击面，进化搜索可高效自动化发现此类攻击；不同AI提供商的模型在对齐鲁棒性上存在显著的不对称性，Claude系列对这类攻击更具抵抗力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks that bypass safety alignment and elicit harmful responses. A growing body of work shows that contextual priming, where earlier turns covertly bias later replies, constitutes a powerful attack surface, with hand-crafted multi-turn scaffolds consistently outperforming single-turn manipulations on capable models.
  However, automated optimization-based red-teaming has remained largely limited to the single-turn setting, iterating over static prompts and lacking the ability to reason about which forms of conversational priming induce compliance. While recent multi-turn, search-based approaches have begun to bridge this gap, the mutator design space underlying effective primed dialogues remains largely unexplored.
  We present ContextualJailbreak, a black-box red-teaming strategy that performs evolutionary search over a simulated multi-turn primed dialogue. The strategy leverages a graded 0-5 harm score from a two-level judge as an in-loop signal, enabling partially harmful responses to guide the search process rather than being discarded.
  Search is driven by five semantically defined mutation operators: roleplay, scenario, expand, troubleshooting, and mechanistic, of which the last two are novel contributions of this work.
  Across 50 representative HarmBench behaviors, ContextualJailbreak achieves an ASR of 100% on gpt-oss:20B, 100% on qwen3-8B, 100% on llama3.1:70B, and 90% on gpt-oss:120B, outperforming four single- and multi-turn baselines by 31-96 percentage points on average.
  The 40 maximally harmful attacks discovered against gpt-oss:120B transfer without adaptation to closed frontier models, achieving 90.0% on gpt-4o-mini, 70.0% on gpt-5, and 70.0% on gemini-3-flash, but only 17.5% on claude-opus-4-7 and 15.0% on claude-sonnet-4-6, revealing a pronounced provider-level asymmetry in alignment robustness.

</details>


### [312] [Fuzzy Fingerprinting Encoder Pre-trained Language Models for Emotion Recognition in Conversations: Human Assessment and Validity Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02665)
*Patrícia Pereira,Helena Moniz,Joao Paulo Carvalho*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出结合预训练语言模型（PLMs）与模糊指纹（FFPs）的可解释情绪识别方法，通过生成类别特定原型并利用模糊相似度匹配，有效减少了对中性类别的过度分类，在保持SOTA性能的同时提供了分类过程的洞察。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准PLM在ERC任务中缺乏可解释性，尤其在类别不平衡数据集中，模型倾向于将少数类情绪误分类为多数类（中性），需要一种既能提升分类性能又能提供分类过程洞察的方法。

Method: 1) 从PLM的潜在空间中提取对话上下文相关的嵌入；2) 通过排序和模糊化处理生成每个情绪类别的模糊指纹原型；3) 推理时将输入话语同样生成模糊指纹，通过模糊相似度函数（基于模糊集交集的聚合）与原型匹配。

Result: FFP集成减少了向中性类别的过度分类；人类评估进一步支持了FFP预测的合理性；方法在SOTA水平上运行。

Conclusion: 该方法弥合了深度神经推理与人类感知之间的鸿沟，在保持顶尖性能的同时提供了分类过程的可解释性见解。

Abstract: In Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC), model decisions should align with nuanced human perception and ideally provide insights on the classification process. Standard encoder pre-trained language models (PLMs) are the state-of-the-art at these tasks but offer little insight into why a certain prediction is made. This is especially problematic in imbalanced datasets, where most utterances are labeled as neutral, making these models frequently misclassify minority emotions as the majority neutral class. To tackle this issue, we introduced a novel, interpretable approach to ERC by combining PLMs with Fuzzy Fingerprints (FFPs). FFP provide class-specific prototypes that reflect the characteristic class activation patterns in the PLM's latent space. They are derived by ranking and fuzzifying the activations of the pooled conversational context-dependent embeddings across training instances for each emotion. At inference time, each input utterance is similarly fuzzy fingerprinted and matched to the emotion prototypes using a fuzzy similarity function based on the aggregation of the intersection of the fuzzy sets that define each FFP. Experimental results show that FFP integration reduces overclassification into the neutral class and human evaluation further supports the adequacy of FFP predictions. Our proposed method thus bridges the gap between deep neural inference and human perception, performing at state-of-the-art level while simultaneously offering valuable insights into the classification procedure.

</details>


### [313] [mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Finetuning LLMs for Multilingual Polarization Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02695)
*Dominik Macko,Alok Debnath,Jakub Simko*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过QLoRA参数高效微调中等规模LLM，并结合数据增强（匿名化、大小写变换、同形字替换），在SemEval-2026任务9中实现多语言、多文化、多事件的极化检测（包含检测、类型、表现形式三个子任务）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线极化常常导致仇恨言论、攻击性话语和社会分裂，因此在问题升级前进行检测对于营造更安全、更包容的在线空间至关重要。

Method: 采用QLoRA参数高效微调技术，对中等规模LLM进行序列分类任务的微调；训练数据包含22种语言，并通过对原始数据进行匿名化、小写化、大写化和同形字替换来增强鲁棒性。

Result: 数据增强策略提升了多语言极化检测的鲁棒性，在检测、类型和表现形式三个子任务上均有表现。

Conclusion: 参数高效微调结合针对性的数据增强，能有效应对多语言、多文化、多事件的极化检测挑战，为构建更安全的在线空间提供了可行方案。

Abstract: SemEval-2026 Task 9 is focused on multilingual polarization detection. Specifically, it covers the identification of multilingual, multicultural and multievent polarization along three axes (in subtasks), namely detection, type, and manifestation. Online polarization presents a concern, because it is often followed by hate speech, offensive discourse, and social fragmentation. Therefore, its detection before it escalates is crucial for a safer and more inclusive online space. We have coped with this SemEval task by finetuning mid-size LLMs for the sequence-classification task using the QLoRA parameter-efficient finetuning technique. The training data augmented the multilingual (22 languages) training sets by anonymized, lower-cased, upper-cased, and homoglyphied counterparts, making the detection more robust.

</details>


### [314] [mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 10: Finetuning LLMs for Conspiracy Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02712)
*Dominik Macko*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于数据增强和自训练的mdok-style系统，微调Qwen3-32B模型用于Reddit评论的阴谋论检测，在SemEval-2026 Task 10中排名第8/52（85百分位），证明了机器生成文本检测方法可迁移至阴谋论检测任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SemEval-2026 Task 10聚焦于阴谋论检测这一具有社会重要性的任务，但训练数据量较小，现有方法面临数据稀疏挑战。

Method: 采用数据增强（Data Augmentation）和自训练（Self-Training）策略应对小样本问题，微调Qwen3-32B大语言模型执行二分类文本分类任务。该方法最初源于机器生成文本检测领域。

Result: 在52个提交系统中排名第8（第85百分位），表现极具竞争力。

Conclusion: 源于机器生成文本检测的方法可有效迁移至阴谋论检测任务，验证了跨任务迁移的可行性，数据增强与自训练策略在小样本场景下表现优异。

Abstract: SemEval-2026 Task 10 is focused on conspiracy detection. Specifically, the goal is to detect whether a Reddit comment expresses a conspiracy belief. Our submitted mdok-style system utilizes data augmentation and self-training (to cope with a rather small amount of training data) to finetune the Qwen3-32B model for a binary text-classification task. The submitted system is very competitive, ranking in the 85th percentile (8th out of 52 submissions). The results shown that our approach, which originated in machine-generated text detection, can be used for conspiracy detection as well.

</details>


### [315] [Reinforcement Learning for LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems through Orchestration Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02801)
*Chenchen Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文以编排轨迹（orchestration traces）为分析框架，系统研究了基于强化学习的LLM多智能体系统。论文识别出三个关键技术轴：八类奖励设计、八类信用/信号单元、五种编排学习子决策（其中停止决策尚无明确的RL训练方法），并释出了包含84篇标注论文的开源资源库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体从单一工具使用者演化为协作团队，强化学习需要同时优化个体行动和任务分配、委派、通信、聚合、停止等协调行为，但目前缺乏统一的分析框架来理解这一新兴问题。

Method: 以编排轨迹（temporal interaction graphs）为透镜，定义包含子智能体生成、委派、通信、工具使用、返回、聚合、停止决策的事件图；沿着三个技术轴（奖励设计、信用分配、编排学习子决策）对现有方法进行系统分类与差距分析。

Result: 识别出奖励设计包含八大类（含编排奖励），信用/信号单元涵盖从token到团队的八级粒度（反事实消息级信用仍然稀缺），编排学习分解为五种子决策（停止决策尚无明确的RL训练方法）。发现学术界与工业界（如Kimi、Codex、Claude Code）之间存在部署规模差距。

Conclusion: 强化学习在多智能体协作编排中的系统性研究仍处于早期阶段，尤其是在停止决策的RL训练和细粒度消息级信用分配方面存在明显空白；工业界实践尚不能被独立验证，未来需要弥合学术评估与工业部署之间的规模鸿沟。

Abstract: As large language model (LLM) agents evolve from isolated tool users into coordinated teams, reinforcement learning (RL) must optimize not only individual actions but also how work is spawned, delegated, communicated, aggregated, and stopped. This paper studies RL for LLM-based multi-agent systems through orchestration traces: temporal interaction graphs whose events include sub-agent spawning, delegation, communication, tool use, return, aggregation, and stopping decisions.
  Using this lens, we identify three technical axes. First, reward design spans eight families, including orchestration rewards for parallelism speedup, split correctness, and aggregation quality. Second, reward and credit signals attach to eight credit- or signal-bearing units from token to team; explicit counterfactual message-level credit remains especially sparse in our curated pool. Third, orchestration learning decomposes into five sub-decisions: when to spawn, whom to delegate to, how to communicate, how to aggregate, and when to stop. In our curated pool as of May 4, 2026, we found no explicit RL training method for the stopping decision.
  We connect academic methods to public industrial evidence from Kimi Agent Swarm, OpenAI Codex, and Anthropic Claude Code. The resulting scale gap is a gap between publicly reported deployment envelopes and open academic evaluation regimes, not independent verification of industrial training traces. We release the artifact at https://github.com/xxzcc/awesome-llm-mas-rl, including an 84-entry tagged paper pool, a 32-record exclusion log, scripted corpus statistics, and a minimal JSON schema for replayable orchestration traces.

</details>


### [316] [FlexSQL: Flexible Exploration and Execution Make Better Text-to-SQL Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02815)
*Quang Hieu Pham,Yang He,Ping Nie,Canwen Xu,Davood Rafiei,Yuepeng Wang,Xi Ye,Jocelyn Qiaochu Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FlexSQL是一个Text-to-SQL代理，其核心设计原则是灵活的数据库交互——代理可以在推理过程中随时探索模式结构、检查数据值和运行验证查询。它生成多样化的执行计划以覆盖多种查询解释，使用SQL或Python实现每个计划，并采用两级修复机制从代码级错误回溯到计划级修订。在Spider2-Snow上，使用gpt-oss-120b达到65.4%的分数，优于使用更强、更大模型的强开源基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大多数Text-to-SQL系统遵循固定流水线，模式元素仅预先检索一次，数据库仅在事后修复时才被重新访问，这限制了从早期错误中恢复的能力。需要一种更灵活的方法来应对复杂模式、模糊查询和数据驱动的决策需求。

Method: FlexSQL采用三种核心策略：1) 灵活的数据库交互——在推理过程中随时探索模式、检查数据值和运行验证查询；2) 生成多样化执行计划以覆盖多种查询解释，并灵活选择SQL或Python实现；3) 两级修复机制，从代码级错误回溯到计划级修订。

Result: 在Spider2-Snow基准上，使用gpt-oss-120b模型达到65.4%的分数，优于使用更强模型（如gpt-o3和DeepSeek-R1）的强开源基线。集成到通用编码代理（Claude Code）中，在Spider2-Snow上带来超过10%的相对提升。

Conclusion: 灵活探索和灵活执行共同促成了方法的有效性，灵活性是Text-to-SQL系统设计的关键原则。

Abstract: Text-to-SQL over large analytical databases requires navigating complex schemas, resolving ambiguous queries, and grounding decisions in actual data. Most current systems follow a fixed pipeline where schema elements are retrieved once upfront and the database is only revisited for post-hoc repair, limiting recovery from early mistakes. We present FlexSQL, a text-to-SQL agent whose core design principle is flexible database interaction: the agent can explore schema structure, inspect data values, and run verification queries at any point during reasoning. FlexSQL generates diverse execution plans to cover multiple query interpretations, implements each plan in either SQL or Python depending on the task, and uses a two-tiered repair mechanism that can backtrack from code-level errors to plan-level revisions. On Spider2-Snow, using gpt-oss-120b, FlexSQL achieves a 65.4\% score, outperforming strong open-source baselines that use stronger, larger models such as gpt-o3 and DeepSeek-R1. When integrated into a general-purpose coding agent (as skills in Claude Code), our approach yields over 10\% relative improvement on Spider2-Snow. Further analysis shows that flexible exploration and flexible execution jointly contribute to the effectiveness of our approach, highlighting flexibility as a key design principle. Our code is available at: https://github.com/StringNLPLAB/FlexSQL

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [317] [Online word-of-mouth in West Africa: the effects of snowball sampling on completion rate, respondent demographics, and survey responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01116)
*Alexander Zaitzeff,Samuel Blazek*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文对比了Facebook广告（河流抽样）和社交分享（雪球抽样）两种招募方式对在线调查的影响，发现雪球抽样用户更易完成问卷、女性比例更高，但回答更短且用时更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同抽样方法（河流抽样与雪球抽样）在社交媒体调查中获取的受访者行为差异，为研究者设计调查策略提供参考。

Method: 在Facebook投放地理定向广告（河流抽样）招募用户填写问卷，同时记录通过社交分享、口碑推荐等雪球抽样方式进入的用户，对比两组用户在完成率、新用户比例、性别分布、回答长度和用时等方面的差异。

Result: 雪球抽样受访者更可能完成调查，新用户和女性比例更高；但回答更简短，填写用时也更少。

Conclusion: 两种抽样方式各有优劣，研究者应根据调查目标（如追求高完成率 vs 高质量回答）选择合适的招募策略。

Abstract: We place geo-targeted advertisements on Facebook to encourage users to fill out an online survey, following a process known as river sampling. We discovered a large number and variety of users also came to our survey through snowball sampling, including shared social media posts and other word-of-mouth referral methods. In this article, we analyze the differences between the respondents from river and snowball sampling. We present evidence that the respondents obtained by snowball sampling are more likely to complete the survey and contain a higher fraction of new users and women than those obtained by river sampling. Additionally, the evidence indicates that users from snowball sampling give shorter responses and take less time on the survey than users from river sampling. We hope these findings provide insight for other researchers who incorporate social media strategies when fielding surveys.

</details>


### [318] [Ideological discrepancy between publishers and news content is linked with audience engagement and consensus on Facebook](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01180)
*Thiago Magrin,Jordan Kobellarz,Pedro O. S. Vaz-de-Melo,Thiago H. Silva*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本研究分析巴西大选期间Facebook上的政治新闻互动，发现内容发布者与新闻之间的意识形态差异与受众互动模式（共识、毒性、情绪等）呈非线性关系：极端意识形态匹配和不匹配都会降低共识，而毒性在极端不匹配下显著增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 政治新闻在社交媒体上并非孤立传播，受众会积极互动、反应和冲突。研究旨在探究发布者与新闻内容的意识形态差异如何影响这些互动中的共识与极化。

Method: 以巴西总统选举期间Facebook上链接政治新闻的帖子为数据，分析意识形态差异、情绪反应、受众共识、帖子毒性及内容话题五个维度，并构建统计模型。

Result: 意识形态差异与互动模式呈非线性关系：极高匹配和极不匹配下共识均下降，毒性在极端不匹配下增加；情绪效价、毒性和意识形态差异是预测共识的最强因素；高党派立场的发布者中，高毒性反而与更高受众共识相关。

Conclusion: 意识形态差异、情绪反应和互动动态与在线政治参与中的共识和极化密切相关；敌对性话语在高党派化语境中可能与群体内共识共存。

Abstract: Political news on social media rarely circulates in isolation: audiences actively engage, react, and clash. Whether these interactions reflect agreement or conflict may depend on the ideological discrepancy between publishers and the news content they share. This study investigates this relationship using Facebook posts linking to political news during a Brazilian presidential election. We analyze five dimensions of engagement: ideological discrepancy between publishers and content, emotional responses, audience consensus, toxicity in posts, and content topics. Our results show that ideological discrepancy is associated with differences in engagement, exhibiting a nonlinear pattern: consensus declines under conditions of very high ideological mismatch and, in our data, also under very high alignment, while toxicity increases primarily under extreme mismatch. A statistical model indicates that emotional valence, toxicity, and ideological discrepancy are the factors most strongly associated with consensus. Among highly partisan publishers, higher toxicity is associated with increased audience consensus, suggesting that hostile discourse may co-occur with in-group agreement in strongly ideological contexts. Overall, these findings highlight how ideological discrepancy, emotional reactions, and interaction dynamics are associated with consensus and polarization in online political engagement.

</details>


### [319] [Shifting Patterns of Extremist Discourse on Facebook: Analyzing Trends and Developments During the Israel-Hamas Conflict](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01528)
*Rr. Nefriana,Muheng Yan,Ahmad Diab,Wanhao Yu,Deborah L. Wheeler,Andrew Miller,Rebecca Hwa,Yu-Ru Lin*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该研究分析了2023年7月至2024年6月期间极端主义Facebook群组的数据，发现其内容趋势与以色列-哈马斯冲突的五件重大事件高度相关，表现为群组活跃度、情感倾向和话题类别的相应变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索极端主义社交媒体内容如何响应现实世界中的重大冲突事件，理解不同偏向群体的行为模式变化。

Method: 收集了2023年7月至2024年6月间反以色列/犹太、反巴勒斯坦/穆斯林以及双向仇恨三类Facebook群组的内容数据，分析了参与度、情感倾向和话题变化，并将其与五件以色列-哈马斯冲突关键事件进行映射比对。

Result: 冲突爆发时，双向仇恨群组活跃度比例下降，单边仇恨群组活跃度比例上升，这一模式在以色列从汗尤尼斯撤军后逆转。冲突期间，负面内容比例在所有三类群组中均上升，中立内容比例下降。反巴勒斯坦/穆斯林群组话题从宗教转向社交媒体行动主义和政治/抗议；反以色列/犹太群组则在战前数周从政治/抗议转向宗教话题。

Conclusion: 极端主义社交媒体趋势与重大地缘政治事件之间存在对应关系，不同偏向的仇恨群组在话题和活跃度上表现出差异化响应模式。

Abstract: This short paper explores trends in extremist Facebook data from July 2023 to June 2024. We examined engagement, sentiment, and topics within Facebook groups categorized as anti-Israel/Semitic, anti-Palestine/Muslim, and anti-both, mapping these trends against five major events related to the recent Israel-Hamas conflict. Our findings support the hypothesis that shifts in trends correspond with these key events, showing varying patterns across different group categories. We observed decreased activity proportion in anti-both groups and increased activity proportion in the two one-sided hate groups at the conflict's onset. This pattern reversed after the Israeli troop withdrawal from Khan Yunis, Gaza. During the conflict, negative content proportion surged, and neutral content proportion fell in all the three group categories. Anti-Palestine/Muslim groups' discourses shifted from religious to social media activism and political/protest around the time the war began, while anti-Israel/Semitic groups moved from political/protest to religious topics a couple of weeks before the war.

</details>


### [320] [Computational foundations of the human world](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01680)
*Marcus J. Hamilton,Abhishek Yadav,Harrison Hartle,Jan Korbel,Niels Kornerup,Andrew J. Stier,Douglas H. Erwin,Hyejin Youn,Christopher P. Kempes,Hajime Shimao,Kyle Harper,James Evans,David H. Wolpert*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出将理论计算机科学的形式化工具用于研究人类社会组织中的计算本质，探讨了分布式共识、社会规模重构、层级模块化结构和外部记忆系统等核心社会现象，并强调了超越图灵机和最坏情况计算复杂度的最新计算框架的潜在应用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类社会（市场、政府、社区、科学界）不断将分散信息转化为集体判断和协调行动，而集体决策的计算难度（时间与通信成本）对社会组织构成根本性约束。然而，目前没有社会科学领域专门关注人类社会世界中的计算本质，这构成了理论与现实之间的鸿沟。

Method: 作者采用理论计算机科学的视角，将社会现象重新概念化为计算问题，识别了四类核心社会现象（分布式共识与协调行动、社会规模重构、层级模块化结构、外部记忆系统），并引入超越图灵机和最坏情况复杂度的计算框架进行分析。

Result: 文章指出理论计算机科学可以为人际共识达成、社会结构随规模变化、模块化层级组织以及外部记忆系统等社会现象提供理解工具，并强调较新的计算理论方法（而非传统图灵机框架）可能带来更大洞见。

Conclusion: 作者主张现在有机会将计算框架应用于人类社会组织研究，从而开辟计算机科学与社会科学交叉的新研究方向，呼吁建立专注于人类社会世界计算本质的学科领域。

Abstract: Human societies continuously transform scattered information into collective judgments and coordinated action, whether through markets discovering prices, governments allocating resources, communities enforcing norms, or science converging on reliable claims. Importantly, the computational difficulty of collective decision-making, particularly the time and communication required to reach solutions, imposes fundamental constraints on social organization. While theoretical computer science offers formal tools for analyzing such problems, for instance, by analyzing resource requirements, including time and memory, surprisingly, there is no domain of social science that focuses on the nature of computation in the human world. This perspective argues that we now have the opportunity to deploy these computational frameworks to study human social organization, opening research directions at the intersection of computer science and social science. We highlight core social phenomena that can be framed as computational, including (i) distributed consensus and coordinated action, (ii) societal restructuring with scale, (iii) hierarchical and modular structure, and (iv) externalized memory systems. We identify several concepts from theoretical computer science that may provide insight into these phenomena, especially emphasizing more recently developed approaches beyond the paradigm of Turing~Machines and worst-case computational complexity.

</details>


### [321] [H3: A Healthcare Three-Hop Index for Physician Referral Network Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02150)
*Zhexi Gu,Jiaxin Ying,Xu-Wen Wang,Can Chen*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出H3（Healthcare Three-Hop Index）用于预测医生转诊网络中的缺失链接，该指标通过中间医生建模间接转诊路径，结合度归一化和冗余惩罚机制，在稀疏、异配、枢纽主导的转诊网络上优于经典启发式方法和图神经网络，且预测结果可分解追踪到具体中间医生。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算方法（三元闭包启发式、图神经网络）无法有效处理医生转诊网络的固有特性（稀疏性、异配度混合、枢纽主导拓扑），导致转诊链接预测精度不足，影响医疗协同优化。

Method: 提出H3（Healthcare Three-Hop Index），通过中间医生建模间接转诊路径，引入度归一化减少高度数节点偏差，加入冗余惩罚机制抑制枢纽节点带来的噪声。

Result: 在Medicare医生共享患者数据上，H3在期内预测（稀疏条件下恢复同期转诊链接）和跨期预测（随时间窗口扩展的鲁棒性测试）两个任务中，均一致优于经典启发式方法和深度学习基线。

Conclusion: H3提供了一种透明、可分解、易于部署的转诊网络补全方案，与黑盒神经网络不同，其预测结果可追溯至具体中间医生，具有可解释性和实用价值。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of physician referral links is essential for optimizing care coordination and reducing fragmentation in healthcare delivery. However, existing computational methods, ranging from triadic closure heuristics to graph neural networks, fail to capture the intrinsic properties of physician referral networks, including sparsity, disassortative degree mixing, and hub-dominated topology. Here, we propose H3, a healthcare three-hop index that addresses these limitations by modeling indirect referral pathways through intermediate physicians, with degree-based normalization and a redundancy penalty to mitigate hub-mediated noise. Using Medicare Physician Shared Patient Patterns data, we evaluate H3 under two complementary prediction regimes: within-period prediction, which assesses recovery of contemporaneous referral links under sparse conditions, and cross-period prediction, which tests robustness to temporal shift as referral windows expand. Across both regimes, H3 consistently outperforms classical heuristics and deep learning-based baselines. Unlike black-box neural network approaches, H3 produces fully decomposable predictions traceable to specific intermediary physicians, offering a transparent and deployable solution for referral network completion.

</details>


### [322] [A Behavioral Micro-foundation for Cross-sectional Network Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02441)
*Carter T. Butts,Alexander Murray-Watters*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文为横截面网络模型建立了基于连续时间随机选择机制的微观行为基础，证明其在适当条件下可用指数族形式表达，从而将个体偏好估计与网络形成规则分离，并通过专业组织友谊分析和小群体相变建模进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 横截面网络模型虽已广泛应用，但缺乏与产生这些网络的行为过程之间的理论联系，作者希望为这类模型提供行为微观基础，弥合统计模型与真实社会过程之间的鸿沟。

Method: 基于连续时间随机选择机制构建微观行为过程，允许代理不在网络中或存在多边控制等复杂情况；证明在适当条件下该过程的均衡行为可用指数族形式表达；将图势能自然分解为基于偏好的效用项和反映连接形成规则的熵项。

Result: 证明了该微观过程的均衡行为可在指数族框架下表达，使得利用现有方法估计个体偏好成为可能；通过专业组织友谊网络分析和小群体结构相变建模验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作为横截面网络模型提供了严谨的行为微观基础，弥合了统计模型与行为过程之间的理论缺口，并为更复杂的网络结构分析提供了统一框架。

Abstract: Models for cross-sectional network data have become increasingly well-developed in recent decades, and are widely used. This has led to a growing interest in the connection between such cross-sectional models and the behavioral processes from which the corresponding networks were presumably generated. Here, we build on prior work in this area to present a behavioral micro-foundation for cross-sectional network models, based on a continuous time stochastic choice mechanism, that can accommodate highly general classes of cases (including agents who are not themselves in the network, and multilateral edge control). As we show, the equilibrium behavior of this process under appropriate conditions can be expressed in exponential family form, allowing estimation of individual preferences using existing methods; the graph potential separates naturally into a preference-based term reflecting agent utilities, and an entropic term reflecting the rules of tie formation. We illustrate our approach via an analysis of friendship in a professional organization, and modeling of phase transitions in the structure of small groups.

</details>


### [323] [Quantum Hypergraph Partitioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02635)
*Yiran Li,Y. Batuhan Yilmaz,Michael Silver,Zachary Vernec,Hans-Arno Jacobsen*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文从量子优化角度研究平衡超图划分问题，形式化了平衡k路超图划分并推导了QUBO编码，实验表明该公式在小规模超图上有效，且平衡惩罚权重对权衡切割质量与平衡性至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超图划分是数据管理等领域的基础优化问题，现有方法在处理高阶关系时面临挑战，作者希望探索量子优化的潜力来解决这一经典问题。

Method: 形式化平衡k路超图划分并推导二元优化公式，区分哪些切割函数可编码为QUBO、哪些导致高阶目标或有理形式；针对3-均匀超图的两路划分进行模拟QAOA和模拟退火实验。

Result: QUBO公式在小规模超图上有效；平衡惩罚权重在切割质量与平衡性之间起关键权衡作用。

Conclusion: 量子优化方法在超图划分问题上具有潜力，但当前仅限于小规模实例；不同切割函数的可编码性差异为未来量子算法设计提供了指导。

Abstract: Hypergraph partitioning is a fundamental optimization problem with applications in data management and other domains involving higher-order relations. In this paper, we study balanced hypergraph partitioning from the perspective of quantum optimization. We formalize balanced $k$-way hypergraph partitioning with general hyperedge cut functions, and derive corresponding binary optimization formulations targeted at quantum optimization methods in both the two-way and multi-way settings. Our discussion highlights which cut functions admit Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) encodings and which instead lead to higher-order binary objectives or rational forms. As a preliminary empirical validation, we focus on balanced two-way partitioning with the all-or-nothing cut on 3-uniform hypergraphs, where a direct QUBO is available, and evaluate simulated Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) and Simulated Annealing (SA) on small instances against exact solutions. The results show that the formulation is effective on small hypergraphs and that the balance-penalty weight plays a critical role in trading off cut quality and balance.

</details>


### [324] [The Activist's Guide to the Decentralized Social Universe: A Framework for Exploring How Decentralized Social Networks Can Support Collective Action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02800)
*Sybille Légitime,Harini Suresh*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个概念框架，帮助活动社群在去中心化社交网络（如Mastodon和Bluesky）中导航，评估其在隐私、安全、社区建设和可持续性等方面的权衡，并应用于两个活动社群案例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主流社交媒体对活动社群存在监控、审查和抹除风险，而去中心化社交网络虽承诺隐私、言论自由和社区自治，但其生态系统复杂，社群难以理解如何有效利用这些平台。

Method: 提出一个概念框架，定义活动社群的核心需求（最小开销、社区建设与触达、线上线下安全、运营可持续性），并将其与具体平台功能（资源效率、互操作性、数据所有权）关联。将该框架应用于Mastodon和Bluesky的对比评估、跨DSN的社区配置分析，以及两个面临不同约束的活动社群案例。

Result: 框架有效揭示了不同DSN在满足活动社群需求方面的社会技术权衡；展示了不同DSN基础设施下出现的社区配置模式及其对集体行动的影响；通过案例说明了社群如何利用该框架找到符合其需求的平台。

Conclusion: 反思DSN的理论承诺，以及塑造和限制参与的结构性条件。

Abstract: The overreaches of mainstream social media platforms have been extensively reported and studied. For activist communities, these platforms pose risks of surveillance, censorship, or erasure. Decentralized social networks (DSNs) serve as alternative online spaces that appear to prioritize values such as user privacy, free speech, and community control. However, the decentralized ecosystem is vast and complex, making it difficult for communities to understand how to best use these platforms for their organizing aims. We aim to fill this gap by proposing a conceptual framework for navigating the DSN landscape that defines core activist community needs -- minimal overhead, community building and reach, on- and off-line safety, and operational sustainability -- and links them to concrete platform affordances such as resource efficiency, interoperability, and data ownership. We apply the framework to (1) evaluate and compare the sociotechnical tradeoffs of two contemporary DSNs (Mastodon and Bluesky), (2) understand broader community configurations that emerge across different DSN infrastructures and their implications for collective action, and (3) explore how two distinct activist communities facing infrastructural and political constraints might use the framework to find platforms that align with their needs. We conclude by reflecting on the theoretical promises of DSNs and the structural conditions that shape and constrain participation across them.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [325] [To Vibe Research or Not to Vibe Research? Generative AI in Qualitative Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00922)
*Katja Karhu,Kari Smolander,Jussi Kasurinen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文总结了关于生成式AI是否适用于定性研究的争论，指出研究哲学（小q实证主义vs大Q非实证主义）、技能、伦理和个人偏好是决定是否使用AI的关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 定性研究者之间对生成式AI是否适合定性研究存在激烈争论，本文旨在梳理这场讨论并阐明其对软件工程研究者的启示。

Method: 通过总结当前关于生成式AI在定性研究中应用的广泛讨论，分析不同研究哲学立场（小q实证主义/后实证主义 vs 大Q非实证主义）对AI适用性的影响。

Result: 研究发现，研究哲学和研究方法（小q vs 大Q）是判断生成式AI是否适用于定性研究的主要标准；此外，研究者自身的技能、伦理考量和个人偏好也影响其决策。

Conclusion: 生成式AI在定性研究中的适用性并非一刀切，需根据研究哲学立场、研究者技能和伦理因素综合判断，这对软件工程领域的定性研究者具有重要参考价值。

Abstract: There has been intense debate among qualitative researchers about whether generative AI is suitable for qualitative research. In this paper, we summarize the broader ongoing discussion of generative AI in qualitative research and its implications for software engineering researchers. The qualitative research approach, small-q (positivist or post-positivist) or Big Q (non-positivist), is among the major criteria for determining whether generative AI can be used in qualitative research. In addition to research philosophy and research approach, skills, ethics, and personal preferences also play a role in researchers' decisions about whether to use AI in qualitative research.

</details>


### [326] [Code World Model Preparedness Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00932)
*Daniel Song,Peter Ney,Cristina Menghini,Faizan Ahmad,Aidan Boyd,Nathaniel Li,Ziwen Han,Jean-Christophe Testud,Saisuke Okabayashi,Maeve Ryan,Jinpeng Miao,Hamza Kwisaba,Felix Binder,Spencer Whitman,Jim Gust,Esteban Arcaute,Dhaval Kapil,Jacob Kahn,Ayaz Minhas,Tristan Goodman,Lauren Deason,Alexander Vaughan,Shengjia Zhao,Summer Yue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文档记录了Meta公司代码世界模型（CWM）在代码生成与推理方面的准备情况评估。基于前沿AI框架进行的预发布测试发现，CWM未带来超出当前AI生态系统的新风险，因此以开放权重形式发布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估CWM模型在代码生成与推理方面是否存在灾难性风险，确保其安全性后再进行开放发布。

Method: 基于前沿AI框架（Frontier AI Framework）识别的潜在灾难风险领域进行预发布测试，评估模型的对齐倾向。

Result: CWM未构成超出当前AI生态系统的前沿风险。

Conclusion: CWM是安全的，可以以开放权重模型的形式发布。

Abstract: This report documents the preparedness assessment of Code World Model (CWM), a model for code generation and reasoning about code from Meta. We conducted pre-release testing across domains identified in our Frontier AI Framework as potentially presenting catastrophic risks, and also evaluated the model's misaligned propensities. Our assessment found that CWM does not pose additional frontier risks beyond those present in the current AI ecosystem. We therefore release it as an open-weight model.

</details>


### [327] [PPO guided Agentic Pipeline for Adaptive Prompt Selection and Test Case Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00942)
*Gourisetty Venkata Sai Koushik,Dama Aditya,Mahankali Harish Sai,Peddi Siddarhta,Shadab Ahmad,Vivek Yelleti*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合PPO强化学习与LLM的智能体框架，通过两阶段过程（代码最小化+自适应提示选择）自动生成测试用例，在二十个基准程序上显著提升了分支覆盖率和行覆盖率，优于CBMC、kS-LLM等方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模软件系统源码庞大、复杂且嵌套深，传统测试用例生成方法难以充分覆盖代码路径，亟需一种能够自适应选择提示策略、引导LLM探索未访问路径的高效测试生成方法。

Method: 两阶段框架：Phase I使用ToT引导的优化代理对源代码进行分区和冗余最小化；Phase II训练基于PPO的策略网络，根据11维状态向量（代码复杂度+覆盖率指标）从8种提示技术（如边界值分析、随机模糊测试等）中自适应选择提示，引导LLM生成测试用例，奖励函数结合行/分支覆盖率提升、未探索分支惩罚和代码长度缩减。

Result: 在20个基准程序上，PPO-LLM在几乎所有循环边界（BOUND 1~2000）下在分支覆盖率和行覆盖率上均优于CBMC、kS-LLM和kS-LLM++。在BOUND=1时，PALS套件上PPO-LLM分支覆盖率达100%，而kS-LLM++仅约86.8%。

Conclusion: PPO驱动的自适应提示选择策略显著优于静态提示策略，尤其在PALS类型程序上效果突出，验证了强化学习与LLM结合在测试用例生成中的有效性。

Abstract: Developing effective test cases capable of thoroughly exercising large-scale software systems is inherently difficult, especially if such systems have voluminous, complex, and deeply nested source codes. In this work, we present a novel approach for generating test cases using a reinforcement learning-driven agentic framework where Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) is coupled with an LLM engine to guide prompt selection during test generation. Our approach consists of two phases. In Phase I, the ToT-guided optimization agent partitions and minimizes the source code by removing redundancies without changing the functional behavior of the source code. In Phase II, a PPO-based policy network is trained to solve the problem of selecting prompts among eight different prompting techniques, such as Boundary Value Analysis, Random Fuzzing, etc., based on the inputted 11-dimensional state vector representing the source code complexity metrics and live coverage metrics to direct the LLM engine towards exploring unvisited paths in the program. The PPO agent receives rewards based on a combination of increases in line and branch coverages, penalties for unexplored branches, and rewards for reducing source code length. From experiments conducted on twenty benchmark programs, it is evident that the proposed approach, PPO-LLM, outperforms CBMC, kS-LLM, and kS-LLM++ in terms of branch and line coverage in almost all cases, for various loop bound values ranging from BOUND~1 to BOUND~2000. While at BOUND~1, the coverage of branches is 100\% using PPO-LLM on the PALS suite, in comparison, it is around 86.8\% using kS-LLM++. This confirms that adaptive prompt selection driven by PPO substantially outperforms static prompting strategies on PALS type programs.

</details>


### [328] [Semantics-Based Verification of an Implemented Shor Oracle for ECDLP in Qrisp](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01008)
*Lei Zhang,Zhiyuan Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文针对基于Qrisp构建的端到端可编译ECDLP实现，引入语义优先的验证视角，指出群体操作oracle的语义细节可能导致预期数学模型失效，并通过案例展示了经典参考一致性与控制执行违规现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Shor风格的量子算法对ECDLP的群操作oracle语义高度敏感，微小的实现选择可能使数学模型失效并导致误导性结论，因此需要一种语义级别的验证方法来确保量子软件的可信性。

Method: 采用语义优先的验证方法：在程序语义层面指定实现oracle，推导其关键组件的精化风格验证义务，并给出oracle族的高层复杂度论证。

Result: 案例研究发现：(i) 核心点更新原语在良好输入下与经典参考一致；(ii) 尽管通过了平凡的控制健全性检查，受控执行在评估工具链下仍可能违反预期的控制律。

Conclusion: 语义审计应作为ECDLP量子软件可信性的实际先决条件，该工作为面向ECDLP的量子软件提供了语义级验证框架。

Abstract: Shor-style quantum algorithms for the elliptic-curve discrete logarithm problem (ECDLP) are highly sensitive to the exact semantics of their group-operation oracles. Consequently, minor implementation choices can invalidate the intended mathematical model and lead to misleading conclusions. This paper introduces a semantics-first verification perspective for an end-to-end, compilable ECDLP implementation built on Qrisp. We specify the implemented oracle at the level of program semantics, derive refinement-style verification obligations for its key components, and provide a high-level complexity argument for the resulting oracle family. A small case study highlights that (i) the core point-update primitive agrees with a classical reference on well-formed inputs, yet (ii) controlled execution may violate the expected control law under the evaluated toolchain, despite a passing trivial control sanity check. These results position semantic auditing as a practical prerequisite for trustworthy ECDLP-oriented quantum software.

</details>


### [329] [ProMoTA: a model-driven framework for end-to-end traceability analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01042)
*Sadaf Mustafiz,Marko Mijalkovic,Moharram Challenger*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出ProMoTA框架，通过整合端到端可追溯性与过程建模，实现MDE工作流的自动化执行和全局模型可追溯性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MDE过程中，模型转换缺乏端到端的可追溯性，难以从高层输入模型追踪到生成的代码，阻碍了全局分析和调试。

Method: 将端到端可追溯性与过程建模相集成，利用大模型和模型转换链自动化执行流程；基于Eclipse的ProMoTA框架扩展了Acceleo转换语言，引入局部可追溯支持，并包含全局可追溯性地图生成器和分析模块。

Result: 实现了从平台无关模型、平台特定模型到代码生成全流程的自动化执行，并生成端到端可追溯性信息，通过无线传感器网络物联网应用案例验证。

Conclusion: ProMoTA框架通过集成的可追溯性机制，为用户提供了转换过程的全局视图，有效支持了MDE工作流的分析和理解。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose an approach that integrates end-to-end traceability with process modelling. OurprocessmodelsrepresentMDEworkflowsthatspan platform-independent-modelling, platform-specificmodelling, andcodegenerationphases. Processexecutionisautomated using megamodels and model transformation chains. The generation of end-to-end traceability information enables global model traceability, from high-level input models to generated code, forming the basis for traceability analysis. We have built an Eclipse-based framework, ProMoTA, to support our approach. ProMoTA extends the Acceleo model transformation language, introducing local traceability support. It also includes a global traceability map generator and end-to-end traceability analysis modules, providing users with a holistic view of the entire transformation process. Our framework is demonstrated with the use of a Wireless Sensor Network-Based IoT application.

</details>


### [330] [RECAP: An End-to-End Platform for Capturing, Replaying, and Analyzing AI-Assisted Programming Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01104)
*Keyu He,Qianou Ma,Valerie Chen,Wayne Chi,Tongshuang Wu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: RECAP是一个开源平台，能够被动记录VS Code中的AI聊天会话和细粒度代码编辑，将其合并为统一时间线进行交互式回放，并提供可扩展的分析层。在41名学生的课程部署中，捕获了2,034个提示和8,239次代码编辑，实现了对开发者-AI交互模式的多源数据分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅依赖聊天日志或Git历史等单一数据源，无法完整重构开发者与AI编码助手的交互全貌（包括哪些提示导致哪些编辑、尝试后放弃的操作、策略演变过程）。需要更全面的数据采集与分析平台。

Method: 开发RECAP平台：(1)在VS Code中被动记录AI聊天会话和细粒度代码编辑，不干扰工作流；(2)将多源数据合并为统一时间线，支持交互式会话回放；(3)提供可扩展分析层，包含行为分类和AI依赖度测量等示例模块。

Result: 在大学软件工程课程中部署，从41名学生处捕获2,034个提示和8,239次代码编辑，验证了平台能够支持单一数据源无法实现的多维度交互模式分析。

Conclusion: RECAP通过链接的多源数据和回放能力，为研究开发者-AI交互模式提供了更全面的分析基础，超越了任何单一数据源的局限性。

Abstract: Understanding how developers interact with AI coding assistants requires more than chat logs or git histories in isolation; it requires reconstructing the full context: which prompt led to which edit, what the developer tried and discarded, and how their strategy evolved over time. We present RECAP (Replay and Examine Captured AI Programming), an open-source platform that (1) passively records AI chat sessions and fine-grained code edits inside VS Code without disrupting the developer's workflow, (2) merges them into a unified timeline for interactive session replay, and (3) exposes an extensible analysis layer, with example modules for behavioral classification and AI reliance measurement. Deployed in a university software engineering course, RECAP captured 2,034 prompts and 8,239 code edits from 41 students across a multi-week project. We demonstrate how the platform's linked data and replay capabilities enable analyses of developer-AI interaction patterns that no single data source could support.

</details>


### [331] [A Domain-Driven Design Simulator for Business Logic-Rich Microservice Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01159)
*Daniel da Palma Pereira,António Rito Silva*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于领域驱动设计的微服务模拟器，允许开发者在不部署完整基础设施的情况下，对业务逻辑进行早期验证和优化，支持多种事务模型（Sagas、TCC）和部署拓扑的灵活切换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微服务架构模拟器多关注网络性能指标而忽视领域语义，工业框架又需要完整基础设施部署，导致早期架构实验困难。作者希望填补这一空白，让开发者能在生产前对富含业务逻辑的微服务系统进行行为验证。

Method: 基于领域驱动设计（DDD），以聚合（Aggregate）为建模核心，将业务逻辑与通信/事务基础设施解耦；支持Sagas和TCC多种事务模型；支持从集中式到完全分布式环境的无缝拓扑切换。

Result: 通过实现一个复杂的多聚合微服务系统并进行并发测试，量化了不同事务模型在本地化与分布式环境下的性能、协调开销和弹性表现，验证了模拟器的有效性。

Conclusion: 该模拟器能以最小开发成本提供确定性的、强大的左移验证环境，助力微服务业务逻辑的早期优化与验证。

Abstract: Developing business-logic-rich microservices requires navigating complex trade-offs between data consistency and distributed coordination. Although patterns like Sagas and Transactional Causal Consistency (TCC) provide mechanisms to manage distributed state, validating their behavior before production is challenging. Current architectural simulators prioritize network metrics over domain semantics, whereas industry frameworks demand full-scale infrastructure deployments, preventing early architectural experimentation.
  To bridge this gap, we introduce a \textit{Domain-Driven Design} (DDD) microservice simulator that isolates core business logic from communication and transactional infrastructure. By modeling microservice systems around aggregates, the simulator allows developers to evaluate identical application code under varying consistency guarantees and network constraints. It features support for multiple transactional models (Sagas, TCC) and seamless transitions across diverse deployment topologies, ranging from centralized execution to fully distributed environments.
  We validate the simulator through the implementation and rigorous concurrency testing of a complex, multi-aggregate microservice system. Through empirical benchmarks, we quantify the performance, coordination overhead, and resilience of different transactional models across localized and distributed execution environments. The findings confirm that the simulator minimizes developer effort while providing a powerful, deterministic environment for the shift-left validation and optimization of business logic implementation in microservice architectures.

</details>


### [332] [The Productivity-Reliability Paradox: Specification-Driven Governance for AI-Augmented Software Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01160)
*Sabry E. Farrag*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文揭示AI编程助手存在"生产力-可靠性悖论"：受控实验显示20-56%效率提升，但大规模RCT和遥测数据却显示开发速度下降、审查时间延长91%。通过67篇文献综述和四个月试点研究，提出AAMT方法论分类和基于交易成本理论的SGM治理模型，论证规范约束力是AI辅助软件可靠性的关键瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关于AI编程助手的效果存在严重矛盾——小规模受控实验显示显著效率提升，而大规模真实部署却显示效率下降。作者试图解释这一悖论，并找出影响AI辅助软件开发可靠性的根本因素。

Method: 采用多声部文献综述法（67篇文献，2022-2026年），结合四个月试点研究，从理论上构建PRP定义、AAMT方法论分类体系和基于交易成本经济学的SGM治理模型，并通过Spec Kit和TDAD两个工具进行实证评估。

Result: 发现三个调节变量（任务抽象度、代码库成熟度、开发者经验）和两个放大机制（代码审查瓶颈、上下文窗口约束）；分类六种方法论三大AI集成层级；SGM模型通过试点研究初步验证有效。

Conclusion: AI辅助软件可靠性的关键瓶颈不在于模型能力，而在于规范约束力（specification discipline）。代码生成质量的提升需要更好的需求规约和治理机制，而非单纯依赖更强的大模型。

Abstract: Since 2022, AI-powered coding assistants have produced contradictory evidence: controlled studies report 20-56% productivity gains on well-scoped tasks, while the most rigorous RCT documents a 19% slowdown for experienced developers, and telemetry across 10,000+ developers shows 98% more pull requests but 91% longer review times with flat delivery metrics. This paper argues these findings constitute the Productivity-Reliability Paradox (PRP): a systematic phenomenon emerging from non-deterministic code generators and insufficient specification discipline. Through a multivocal literature review of 67 sources (2022-2026), this paper: (1) formally defines the PRP with three moderating variables (task abstraction, codebase maturity, developer experience) and two amplifying mechanisms (code review bottleneck, context window constraint); (2) proposes the AI-Augmented Methodology Taxonomy (AAMT), classifying six methodologies under three AI integration tiers; (3) introduces the Specification Governance Model (SGM), grounded in Transaction Cost Economics, with a practical governance decision guide; and (4) evaluates Spec Kit and TDAD as SGM instantiations via a four-month pilot study. Specification discipline, not model capability, is the binding constraint on AI-assisted software dependability.

</details>


### [333] [ClarifySTL: An Interactive LLM Agent Framework for STL Transformation through Requirements Clarification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01209)
*Yue Fang,Zhi Jin,Jie An,Hongshen Chen,Xiaohong Chen,Naijun Zhan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出ClarifySTL框架，通过交互式需求澄清（检测模糊/歧义+生成查询+用户反馈）提升自然语言到信号时序逻辑（STL）的自动转换质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言需求中存在模糊和歧义信息，现有LLM方法难以处理这些不确定内容，导致生成的STL规范可能不准确。

Method: ClarifySTL分三步：1）检测需求中的模糊表达并生成澄清查询；2）检测歧义并生成针对性查询，根据用户反馈更新需求；3）将澄清后的需求用LLM转换为STL规范。

Result: 在DeepSTL、STL-DivEn及新构建的AmbiEval基准上评估，实验结果表明ClarifySTL有效。

Conclusion: 交互式澄清框架能更好地捕捉用户意图，减少用户负担，提升STL转换的准确性。

Abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a formal language for specifying real-time behaviors of cyber-physical systems (CPS). Automatically transforming natural language requirements into STL specifications has received growing attention. Recent efforts leveraging large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance, but some natural language requirements in practice contain vague or ambiguous information, which remains challenging for LLMs to handle. To address these challenges, we propose ClarifySTL, an interactive LLM-agent framework that enhances STL transformation through requirements clarification. ClarifySTL first detects vague expressions that indicate underspecified information in a requirement.
