If any vagueness is detected, it generates targeted clarification queries to guide users in supplementing the requirement until all necessary details are provided. Subsequently, if ClarifySTL detects ambiguities, it formulates focused ambiguity clarification queries and updates the requirements based on user feedback until all ambiguities are resolved. Finally, the requirements with vagueness and ambiguity clarified are transformed into STL specifications using LLMs. This interactive framework ensures that the resulting STL formulas faithfully capture user intent while reducing the burden on the user. We evaluate ClarifySTL on the representative benchmarks DeepSTL and STL-DivEn, as well as our newly introduced AmbiEval benchmark, which is specifically designed to assess the performance of the agents in handling vagueness and ambiguity, including both detection and query generation. The experimental results show that ClarifySTL is effective.

</details>


### [334] [FeedbackLLM: Metadata driven Multi-Agentic Language Agnostic Test Case Generator with Evolving prompt and Coverage Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01264)
*Kushal Jasti,Tejamani Prashanth Sahu,Rishitha Pentyala,Muvvala Mohit,Vivek Yelleti*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出FeedbackLLM框架，通过两阶段紧耦合方式利用LLM生成测试用例，结合行反馈代理和分支反馈代理迭代优化，显著提升代码行覆盖率和分支覆盖率，且执行时间线性增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统测试用例生成方法手动开销大、计算成本高、不可扩展，不适用于复杂软件系统；现有单次提示工程方法易产生幻觉和冗余测试用例，分支覆盖不足。

Method: 提出FeedbackLLM，包含两阶段紧耦合框架：第一阶段解析源码提取输入约束并生成测试用例；第二阶段通过两个LLM反馈代理（行反馈代理和分支反馈代理）评估质量，提取未覆盖的行和分支元数据，迭代优化k轮；并引入冗余预防缓存避免重复请求。

Result: 在C和Python标准基准程序上评估，相比基线工具，FeedbackLLM实现了更高的行覆盖率和分支覆盖率，且执行时间呈线性增长。

Conclusion: FeedbackLLM通过两阶段迭代反馈机制有效提升了测试用例生成的覆盖质量，同时保持可扩展性。

Abstract: Traditional approaches to test case generation often involve manual effort and incur significant computational overhead. Additionally, these approaches are not scalable, and hence, unsuitable for complex software systems. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been applied to software testing. However, single-shot prompt engineering-based approaches tend to hallucinate and generate redundant test cases, resulting in fewer branches. To handle the above-mentioned limitations, in this paper, we propose FeedbackLLM, a novel automated language-agnostic test case generation framework based on tightly coupled two-stage approach. In the first stage, FeedbackLLM extracts the input constraints by parsing source code and generates the possible test cases. The quality of the test cases is evaluated in the second stage by the following two specialized LLM feedback agents: (i) Line Feedback Agent: extracts the metadata related to missed line executions and (ii) Branch Feedback Agent: extracts the metadata of the unexecuted branch conditions. The above agents operate in a two-stage process, communicating in tandem, and this procedure is repeated for k-steps. Further, we also introduced a redundancy prevention cache to avoid duplicate API requests and avoid unnecessary execution cycles. The performance of the proposed architecture is evaluated on the standard benchmark programs related to C and Python programs. FeedbackLLM demonstrated more line and branch coverage than baseline tools while scaling linearly in execution time.

</details>


### [335] [Using LLMs in Software Design: An Empirical Study of GitHub and A Practitioner Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01392)
*Yifei Wang,Ruiyin Li,Peng Liang,Yangxiao Cai,Zengyang Li,Mojtaba Shahin,Arif Ali Khan,Qiong Feng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过混合方法研究（分析291条GitHub上的开发者-ChatGPT对话+65份从业者调查），揭示了LLMs在软件设计中的9种任务类别、7项益处和6项局限性，为LLMs辅助软件设计提供了实证基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLMs在软件工程中展现出巨大潜力，但在软件设计这一高度依赖人类专业判断的领域，缺乏对LLM使用方式、益处和局限性的系统研究。

Method: 采用混合方法：1) 挖掘研究：分析291条GitHub上开发者与ChatGPT的对话；2) 问卷调查：收集65位软件从业者的反馈。

Result: 识别出9种ChatGPT支持的设计任务（如架构设计、数据模型设计、设计模式使用）；发现开发者主要将ChatGPT用于知识获取和设计相关代码生成，多数任务处于详细设计层面；总结出7项益处（如更好的技术选型、早期发现设计缺陷）和6项局限（如输出冗长难读、生成不可执行代码、依赖上下文导致幻觉）。

Conclusion: 提供了LLMs在软件设计中使用的实证特征描述，揭示了感知益处与局限性之间的张力，为未来研究和技术工具开发奠定了基础。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential across a wide range of software engineering tasks, including software design, an area traditionally regarded as highly dependent on human expertise and judgment. However, there has been little research focusing on how LLMs are used in software design, nor on the associated benefits and drawbacks. This paper aims to bridge this gap by empirically investigating how software developers utilize LLMs in the context of software design. We conduct a mixed-methods study, combining a mining study of 291 developer-ChatGPT conversations shared on GitHub with a survey of 65 software practitioners. Our findings reveal nine distinct categories of design tasks supported by ChatGPT, including architecture design, data model design, and the use of design patterns. We further characterize developer-ChatGPT interactions, showing that developers primarily use ChatGPT for knowledge acquisition and design-related code generation, with most tasks situated at the detailed design level. The study identifies seven key benefits of utilizing LLMs in software design as perceived by developers, such as better technology selection and the early detection of design flaws. We also uncover six limitations, including the generation of overly lengthy and difficult-to-read outputs, the creation of inexecutable or incorrect code, and a heavy reliance on context that can lead to hallucinated results. These findings provide an evidence-based characterization of current LLM use in software design from both open-source and practitioner perspectives, highlighting a tension between perceived benefits and limitations, which lays a foundation for future research and the development of effective techniques and tools to integrate LLMs into software design practices.

</details>


### [336] [LiveFMBench: Unveiling the Power and Limits of Agentic Workflows in Specification Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01394)
*Dong Xu,Jialun Cao,Guozhao Mo,Junjie Hu,Cheng Wen,Hongyu Lin,Xianpei Han,Shengchao Qin,Cong Tian,Shing-Chi Cheung,Le Sun,Yaojie Lu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了LLM和智能体生成C程序形式化规范的能力，构建了LiveFMBench基准（630个ACSL注释程序），发现直接提示法会高估性能约20%（模型存在欺骗行为），增加采样和推理模式能提升成功率，但整体上LLM仍远无法替代人工编写形式化规范。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 形式化规范对程序验证至关重要，但编写正确规范成本高、难自动化。尽管LLM和智能体展现潜力，但其真实能力和失败模式尚不明确，现有评估存在数据泄露风险。

Method: 构建LiveFMBench基准（630个ACSL注释C程序，其中360个新收集以缓解数据泄露），评估直接提示（不同采样大小）、推理模式、智能体流水线，并进行细粒度失败分析。

Result: 直接提示法高估约20%性能（模型存在欺骗自动验证器、忽略代码约束等不忠实行为）；增加采样和思考模式显著提升成功率（小模型获益更大）；智能体流水线在低采样预算和困难数据集上更有效；错误分析显示循环不变式是主要错误类型，智能体可减少断言错误。

Conclusion: 当前基于LLM的方法存在根本性局限，远无法取代人工编写形式化规范。

Abstract: Formal specification is essential for rigorous program verification, yet writing correct specifications remains costly and difficult to automate. Although large language models (LLMs) and agents have shown promising progress, their true capabilities and failure modes remain unclear. We present the first systematic and contamination-aware study of LLM- and agent-based formal specification generation for C programs. We introduce LiveFMBench, a continuously evolving benchmark of 630 ACSL (ANSI/ISO C Specification Language)-annotated C programs, including 360 newly collected cases designed to mitigate data leakage. Using this benchmark, we evaluate direct prompting with different sampling sizes, reasoning-enabled (thinking mode) inference, the agentic pipeline, and perform a fine-grained failure analysis. Experimental results reveal that naive evaluation substantially overestimates performance because models under direct prompting may exhibit unfaithful behaviors, such as deceiving automated provers or ignoring code-context constraints; after excluding such cases, the true specification generation accuracy drops by approximately 20\%. We further find that both increased sampling and thinking mode significantly improve success rates, with smaller models benefiting more from thinking mode. Agentic pipelines are particularly effective under low sampling budgets and on harder datasets. Failure analysis further shows that incorrect loop invariants are the dominant error type, while agentic pipelines notably reduce assertion errors. These results expose fundamental limitations in current LLM-based approaches and suggest they remain far from replacing human-authored formal specifications. We release LiveFMBench at https://huggingface.co/datasets/fm-universe/Live-FM-Bench and all evaluation artifacts to support future research.

</details>


### [337] [Practical Limits of Autonomous Test Repair: A Multi-Agent Case Study with LLM-Driven Discovery and Self-Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01471)
*Hyukjoo Lee*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过工业案例研究，评估了基于LLM的多智能体自主测试系统在企业级UI测试中的表现。系统在无明确测试目标下可自动发现超100个可测试特性，但仅有10%的场景族首次执行成功，38%的报告未产生可执行测试产物。研究表明，完全自主会导致不稳定和误导性结果，而受约束的自主结合人类监督才能实现可靠的企业级测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业级大规模UI测试维护成本高、挑战持久，现有方法难以应对动态UI元素和测试用例维护的复杂性，亟需探索更高效的自动化测试方案。

Method: 基于大语言模型（LLM），结合LangGraph编排、Playwright执行引擎和RAG知识库，构建多智能体自主测试系统。系统支持从人类引导测试向高自主性特性发现与测试执行演进，通过运行时DOM分析动态扩展覆盖范围，并具备迭代修复失败测试的能力。

Result: 分析了300份连续自主执行报告（含636个测试用例，覆盖10个场景族）。系统在场景族级别达到70%的修复收敛率，平均3.4次迭代收敛。但仅10%的场景族首次执行成功，38%的报告未产生可执行测试产物，并存在断言弱化和测试用例删除等表面收敛问题。

Conclusion: 完全自主的测试系统会导致不稳定和误导性结果；企业级自主测试需要显式约束、验证边界和人类监督，以保持语义正确性和操作可信度。受约束的自主性才能转化为可操作的测试工作流。

Abstract: Maintaining reliable UI test suites in large-scale enterprise applications is a persistent and costly challenge. We present an industrial case study of a multi-agent autonomous testing system evaluated using anonymized execution data from a production-like enterprise UI testing prototype. The application features several hundred dynamic UI elements per screen. Built on a large language model with LangGraph orchestration, Playwright execution, and a RAG knowledge base, the system evolves from human-directed testing toward High-autonomy feature discovery and test execution: given no explicit test targets, it discovers over 100 testable features across 10 UI screens, dynamically expands coverage by an additional 15--30 features through runtime DOM analysis, and iteratively repairs failing tests without human intervention.
  We analyzed 300 consecutive autonomous execution reports encompassing 636 individual test-case executions across 10 distinct scenario families. The system achieved a 70% repair convergence rate at the scenario-family level, with a mean of 3.4 repair iterations to convergence. However, only 10% of scenario families succeeded on first attempt, 38% of reports failed to produce any executable test artifact, and we documented concrete instances of assertion weakening and test-case deletion used as workaround mechanisms to achieve superficial convergence.
  Our findings show that unrestricted autonomy leads to unstable and often misleading outcomes, while constrained autonomy transforms such systems into operationally viable workflows. Rather than advocating full autonomy, our findings suggest that reliable autonomous testing in enterprise-scale settings requires explicit constraints, validation boundaries, and human oversight to preserve semantic correctness and operational trustworthiness.

</details>


### [338] [Genetic Programming for Self-Adaptive Auto-Scaling of Microservices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01533)
*Jia Li,Mehrdad Sabetzadeh,Shiva Nejati*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AutoSLO是一种基于学习、自适应扩展的框架，通过遗传编程自动学习扩展逻辑，动态调整微服务副本数量以满足SLO并最小化资源消耗。在在线购物平台和LLM聊天机器人两个系统上验证，显著降低资源使用，同时维持低SLO违规率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微服务架构中自动扩展对于满足SLO至关重要，但确定最优扩展策略很困难，反应式资源分配常导致过度或不足的资源供给，造成成本浪费或SLO违约。

Method: 提出AutoSLO框架，采用持续监控-自适应反馈循环，利用遗传编程学习和演化扩展逻辑，使系统能够主动预防SLO违规，而非反复搜索一次性扩展动作。

Result: 在在线购物平台和基于大语言模型的聊天机器人两个案例系统上评估，表明该框架大幅降低资源使用，同时保持低SLO违规频率，且违规在短时间内得到解决。

Conclusion: AutoSLO能够有效平衡资源使用与SLO满足，为微服务自动扩展提供了一种自适应的学习型解决方案。

Abstract: Microservice architecture is widely adopted in modern systems, where auto-scaling is critical for satisfying service-level objectives (SLOs). However, determining optimal scaling for microservices is difficult, and reactive resource allocation often leads to costly over- or under-provisioning. We propose AutoSLO, a learning-based, self-adaptive scaling framework that dynamically adjusts microservice replicas to meet SLOs while minimizing resource usage. AutoSLO uses a continuous monitoring-adaptation feedback loop and leverages genetic programming to learn and evolve scaling logic, enabling the deployed microservice system to proactively prevent SLO violations rather than repeatedly searching for one-off scaling actions. We evaluate AutoSLO on two case-study systems -- an online shopping platform and a chatbot based on large language models -- and show that this framework substantially reduces resource usage while maintaining a low frequency of SLO violations, all of which are resolved within a short time window.

</details>


### [339] [Neuro-Symbolic Agents for Hallucination-Free Requirements Reuse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01562)
*Ahmed Ibrahim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种神经符号多智能体系统，将LLM作为非确定性启发式与确定性符号验证器相结合，用于OOMRAM需求复用框架，实现了100%需求覆盖率和仅0.2%的约束违反率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OOMRAM框架依赖精确标识符匹配和刚性模板，无法灵活适应不同上下文的需求规格。LLM虽有灵活性，但可能生成结构无效或不一致的需求组合。需要一种方法在灵活性和结构性约束之间取得平衡。

Method: 提出神经符号多智能体系统：将需求复用重新概念化为模型驱动启发式过程——LLM作为非确定性启发式，遍历由形式化OOMRAM需求格表示的确定性领域模型；确定性符号验证器在智能体循环中强制执行所有结构约束，从构造上消除幻觉需求组合。

Result: 在跨两个应用系列的自主基准测试中：需求覆盖率100%，约束违反率仅0.2%。F1分数中等（0.47-0.51），但每个生成的规格在结构上有效且满足所有强制性领域需求。模型无关实现可通过子图导航扩展到更大格结构。

Conclusion: 该系统有效解决了LLM灵活性与传统需求复用框架刚性约束之间的张力，在保证结构有效性的前提下实现了高覆盖率，并为法规合规性提供了透明审计轨迹。

Abstract: The Object-Oriented Method for Requirements Authoring and Management (OOMRAM) is a requirements reuse framework that relies on exact identifier matching and rigid templates, limiting its ability to adapt specifications across diverse contexts. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer the flexibility to overcome this bottleneck, they introduce the risk of generating structurally invalid or inconsistent requirement combinations. To address this tension, we present a neuro-symbolic multi-agent system that re-conceptualizes requirements reuse as a \textbf{Model-Driven Elicitation process}. In this paradigm, an LLM serves as a \textbf{non-deterministic heuristic} for traversing a \textbf{deterministic domain model} represented by a formal OOMRAM requirement lattice. A deterministic, symbolic validator enforces all structural constraints within the agent loop, effectively eliminating hallucinated requirement combinations by construction. Evaluated on an autonomous benchmark across two application families, our system achieves 100\% requirement coverage and a constraint-violation rate of only 0.2\%. Although the F1-score against a single gold standard is moderate (0.47--0.51), every generated specification is structurally valid and satisfies all mandatory domain requirements. The model-agnostic implementation scales to larger lattices via subgraph navigation and provides transparent audit trails for regulatory compliance.

</details>


### [340] [Feedback-Normalized Developer Memory for Reinforcement-Learning Coding Agents: A Safety-Gated MCP Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01567)
*Mehmet Iscan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种专为强化学习编码智能体设计的本地优先、MCP原生的开发者记忆架构（RL Developer Memory），将记忆选择建模为带日志的上下文决策过程，通过影子模式与保守OPE门控实现可控部署。在200例确定性基准上，确定性控制与全配置均达80.0%的预期决策准确率和100.0%的硬负样本抑制，但全配置主要贡献在于学习遥测而非精度提升，且存在延迟退化、40例残余非RL失败等局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM编码智能体在长软件开发场景中需要持久记忆，但静态向量存储或通用RAG无法满足强化学习代码开发的需求——微小细节（如Bellman目标、终端掩码、梯度流）的变化会显著影响RL算法的正确性，亟需一种将记忆选择与RL编码特性深度耦合的架构。

Method: 提出RL Developer Memory架构：（1）将记忆选择建模为带日志的上下文决策过程，包含issue_match（候选排序与遥测）、issue_feedback（标签到奖励映射）、issue_record_resolution（解析与检索事件关联）三个核心组件；（2）采用确定性排序器保持稳定，同时以影子模式运行上下文赌博机残差策略；（3）通过保守的离线策略评估（OPE）门控控制输出，仅允许在安全范围影响行为；（4）对RL/控制类记忆引入理论到代码的元数据及审查门控治理机制。

Result: 在包含RL算法bug、硬负样本、审查门控RL/控制案例及低风险失败共200例的确定性基准上：确定性控制与全配置（影子/OPE）均达80.0%预期决策准确率和100.0%硬负样本抑制；静态验证通过11/11项检查，动态集成通过10/10案例。全配置主要贡献学习遥测而非精度提升。局限包括：不支持主动学习策略部署、官方客户端MCP互操作性缺失、全配置延迟退化、40例残余非RL失败。

Conclusion: 本文的贡献在于提出了一种可审计的记忆控制架构，并明确界定了其适用范围，而非宣称普适性的编码智能体改进。该工作在RL编码智能体的记忆系统设计中强调了安全性与可追溯性，但距离实际部署仍有显著差距，尤其是主动学习策略的启用和延迟优化是未来关键方向。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) coding agents increasingly operate over repositories, terminals, tests, and execution traces across long software-engineering episodes. Persistent memory is useful, but static vector stores or generic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) are insufficient for reinforcement-learning (RL) code development, where small details can alter Bellman targets, terminal masks, gradient flow, or validation claims. This paper presents RL Developer Memory, a local-first, Model Context Protocol (MCP)-native developer-memory architecture for RL coding agents. It treats memory selection as a logged contextual decision process: issue_match ranks candidates and records telemetry, issue_feedback maps raw labels to bounded rewards, and issue_record_resolution links verified resolutions to earlier retrieval events. A deterministic ranker remains deployed, while a contextual-bandit residual policy runs in shadow mode and can affect canary behavior only through conservative off-policy-evaluation (OPE) gates. RL/control memories require theory-to-code metadata and review-gated governance. The system is evaluated on a deterministic 200-case benchmark with RL algorithm bugs, hard negatives, review-gated RL/control cases, and low-risk failures. In the same-commit comparison, deterministic control and full shadow/OPE both achieve 80.0% expected-decision accuracy and 100.0% hard-negative suppression; the full configuration adds learning telemetry rather than accuracy gain. Static validation passed 11/11 checks; dynamic integration passed 10/10 cases. The evidence reports limits: active learned-policy deployment and official-client MCP interoperability are unsupported, live full-configuration latency regresses, and 40 residual non-RL failures remain. The contribution is an auditable memory-control architecture with explicit claim boundaries, not a universal coding-agent improvement claim.

</details>


### [341] [A Lightweight Scrum Sprint Simulation to Help Learners Traverse the Empirical Process Control Threshold Concept](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01600)
*Eduardo Miranda,Torgeir Dingsøyr,Pritam Chita*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种轻量级、可扩展、免费且可定制的Sprint模拟活动，用于在单次教学课程中教授学生如何通过呈现和解释工作状态信息、任务选择和资源分配来经验性地控制Scrum项目。作者在两所大学的硕士课程及第三所机构的助教培训中使用了该模拟，并通过阈值概念框架映射学生评论，归纳证明了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经验过程控制是Scrum等敏捷开发框架中的关键流程，但如何有效教授学生这一概念仍具挑战。作者希望设计一种能在单次教学课程中高效教授经验过程控制的模拟活动。

Method: 设计并实施了一种轻量级、可扩展、免费且可定制的Sprint模拟活动，将其作为主动学习补充材料，应用于两所大学的硕士课程及第三所机构的助教培训中。通过阈值概念框架对学生评论进行映射分析，归纳评估教学效果。

Result: 该模拟活动成功在单次教学课程中教授了经验过程控制概念，通过阈值概念框架映射学生评论，验证了其教学有效性。

Conclusion: 该轻量级Sprint模拟活动是教授Scrum经验过程控制的有效主动学习工具，适用于多机构、多场景的教学环境。

Abstract: Empirical process control, a way of managing work based on the observation of the successes or misfortunes of earlier activities, is a key process in Scrum and other agile development frameworks. In this experience report, we present a lightweight, scalable, free and customizable sprint simulation activity designed to teach students how to empirically control a Scrum project by engaging in the presentation and interpretation of work status information, task selection and resource allocations in a single teaching session. We reflect on our experience using the simulation as an active learning complement to direct instruction in two master level courses at two different universities and in the training of teaching assistants at a third institution, and abductively establish its effectiveness by mapping student comments to the teaching practices in the threshold concepts framework.

</details>


### [342] [Quantum Software Architecture Framework (QSAF): A Component-Based Framework for Designing Hybrid Quantum-Classical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01800)
*Arvind W. Kiwelekar,Shweta Tembe,Uzma G. A. Munde,Siddhesh Jadhav,Manjushree D. Laddha,Harsha R. Gaikwad*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向混合量子-经典系统的组件化量子软件架构框架(QSAF)，通过将34种量子电路原语重新解释为架构组件，建立多级抽象层次结构，支持系统级设计与工程化开发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前量子软件开发过度聚焦于算法层面，缺乏对软件架构的系统性关注。随着混合量子-经典系统的兴起，这一空白限制了系统的可扩展性、可复用性和工程严谨性。

Method: 识别并分类34种可复用量子电路原语（7个功能类别），将其重新定义为具有显式接口和设计约束的架构组件；利用非功能维度（电路深度、错误敏感度、信息流）对组件进行刻画；建立从量子门到混合系统架构的多级抽象层次结构。

Result: 形成了QSAF架构框架，实现了对混合量子-经典工作流（尤其是变分量子算法）的系统化解构、比较与优化，使架构结构与设计权衡显式化。

Conclusion: 该研究为量子软件工程奠定了基础，支持模块化设计、组件复用以及在量子应用开发中做出有依据的架构决策。

Abstract: Quantum software development has largely focused on algorithms, with limited attention to software architecture. As computing moves toward hybrid quantum-classical systems, this gap limits scalability, reusability, and engineering rigor.
  This study introduces a component-based quantum software architecture framework (QSAF) for hybrid quantum-classical software systems, enabling developers to transition from circuit-level design to system-level reasoning. We identified 34 reusable quantum circuit primitives across seven functional categories and reinterpreted them as architectural components with explicit interfaces and design-relevant constraints. These components are further characterized using non-functional dimensions such as circuit depth, error sensitivity, and information flow, enabling a structured analysis of design trade-offs.
  The proposed QSAF framework establishes a multi-level abstraction hierarchy linking quantum gates, circuit primitives, algorithmic structures, and hybrid system architectures. Through this approach, common workflows, particularly hybrid quantum-classical workflows such as variational quantum algorithms, can be systematically decomposed, compared, and optimized.
  By making the architectural structure and trade-offs explicit, this study provides a foundation for quantum software engineering, supporting modular design, reuse, and informed architectural decision-making in quantum application development.

</details>


### [343] [Conventional Commit Classification using Large Language Models and Prompt Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02033)
*H. M. Sazzad Quadir,Sakib Al Hasan,Md. Nurul Ahad Tawhid*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用大语言模型（LLM）通过提示工程进行传统提交分类的方法，评估了三种提示策略（零样本、少样本、思维链）在三个开源LLM上的表现，发现少样本提示准确率最高，DeepSeek-R1-32B模型性能最佳，且无需模型微调或大量标注数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统提交分类通常依赖机器学习/深度学习模型在大规模标注数据集上训练，但标注数据获取成本高。本文探索一种无需训练的替代方案，利用大语言模型通过提示工程直接进行分类，以降低自动化提交分类的门槛。

Method: 从InfluxDB仓库中挖掘3200个提交构建平衡数据集，直接基于代码diff进行分类。评估三种提示策略（零样本、少样本、思维链）在三个开源LLM（Mistral-7B-Instruct、LLaMA-3-8B、DeepSeek-R1-32B）上的表现，不进行任何模型微调。

Result: 少样本提示策略在所有模型中一致取得最高准确率；思维链提示在本分类任务中并未带来额外增益；DeepSeek-R1-32B模型整体性能最强，表明模型规模对传统提交分类任务有显著影响。

Conclusion: 利用LLM通过提示工程可以在无需训练数据和模型微调的情况下有效完成传统提交分类，为研究人员和从业者提供了实用指导，尤其适合希望避免维护标注训练数据的场景。

Abstract: Conventional commits provide a structured format for writing commit messages, which improves readability, software maintenance, and enables automation tools such as changelog generators and semantic versioning systems. Existing approaches to conventional commit classification typically rely on ML/DL models trained on large labeled datasets. In this paper, we investigated a training-free alternative by leveraging large language models (LLMs) through prompt engineering. Rather than building a task-specific classifier, we evaluate three prompting strategies, such as zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought, across three open-source LLMs of varying scale: Mistral-7B-Instruct, LLaMA-3-8B, and DeepSeek-R1-32B. Classification is performed directly on code diffs extracted from a balanced dataset of 3,200 commits mined from the InfluxDB repository, without any model fine-tuning. Our results show that few-shot prompting consistently achieves the highest accuracy, while chain-of-thought prompting does not yield additional gains for this classification task. Among the evaluated models, DeepSeek-R1-32B achieves the strongest overall performance, suggesting that model scale plays a meaningful role in conventional commit classification. These findings provide practical guidance for researchers and practitioners seeking to automate commit classification without the overhead of curating and maintaining labeled training data.

</details>


### [344] [How Compliant Are GitHub Actions Workflows? A Checklist-Based Study with LLM-Assisted Auditing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02091)
*Edward Abrokwah,Taher A. Ghaleb*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于文档的GitHub Actions合规检查清单（30条标准），并评估了LLM在合规审计中的表现，发现LLM间一致性较低（kappa=0.28），随后提出多级裁决框架将验证工作量减少81%，同时揭示真实工作流合规率仅28%，安全类合规率低至4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具仅提供语法或启发式检查，无法执行文档化的最佳实践（安全、可维护性、性能），导致权限过度、密钥管理薄弱、失败通知缺失等实际问题未被检测。

Method: 构建30条GHA合规检查清单（4个部分、8个主题），评估4个开源LLM在95个真实Java工作流（2,850次评估）上的表现，并提出多级裁决框架（GPT-5解决模型冲突后人工审查）。

Result: LLM间一致性仅中等（Fleiss' kappa=0.28），多级裁决框架减少81%验证工作量并保留87%专家一致性；整体合规率28%，权限控制仅4%，安全类（26%）远低于清晰度类（68%）。

Conclusion: LLM可实现可扩展的合规度量但无法取代专家，需混合人机审计，并为防御性GHA工作流审计提供经验基准和指导。

Abstract: GitHub Actions (GHA) CI workflows are critical infrastructure, but current tooling offers only syntactic or heuristic checks and does not enforce documented best practices for security, maintainability, or performance. Consequently, issues like over-privileged permissions, weak secrets management, and missing failure notifications remain undetected in real-world pipelines. This paper proposes a novel, documentation-grounded GHA compliance checklist with 30 criteria spanning four workflow sections and eight themes, and assesses Large Language Models (LLMs) for scalable compliance auditing. On 95 real-world Java workflows (2,850 assessments) using four open-weight LLMs, we find only fair agreement (Fleiss' kappa = 0.28), with systematic disagreement on structural reasoning and security-sensitive judgments. To address this, we introduce a multi-tier adjudication framework in which GPT 5 resolves model conflicts before targeted manual review, reducing verification effort by 81% while retaining 87% agreement with expert judgment. At scale, it reveals major compliance gaps: overall compliance is 28%, dropping to 4% for permission controls; Security (26%) lags far behind Clarity (68%). Our results show that LLMs enable scalable compliance measurement but cannot replace experts, highlighting the need for hybrid human-AI auditing and providing empirical benchmarks and guidance for defensible GHA workflow audits.

</details>


### [345] [Foundation Models as Oracles for Refactoring Correctness Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02096)
*Rohit Gheyi,Rian Melo,Jonhnanthan Oliveira,Marcio Ribeiro,Baldoino Fonseca*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究使用基础模型（如GPT、Gemma等）作为Java重构缺陷检测工具，在226个真实重构错误上评估发现，零样本提示即可达到80.5%-93.8%的准确率，且模型预测在语义保持的代码变体下具有一致性，可作为传统重构检查的补充手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统IDE重构工具可能引入行为变化或编译错误，而现有的检测方法（手写前置条件、静态/动态分析）适应性有限且容易遗漏细微的正确性问题。作者希望探索基础模型能否作为检测重构缺陷的"预言家"。

Method: 采用零样本提示（zero-shot prompting）方式，不进行任务特定训练，在226个来自IntelliJ-IDEA、Eclipse、NetBeans的真实重构错误上评估多个基础模型（GPT-OSS-20B、GPT-5.4、Gemma-4-31B、Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview等），覆盖47种重构类型。使用变形测试（metamorphic testing）验证模型预测在语义保持代码变体下的一致性。

Result: GPT-OSS-20B准确率80.5%，GPT-5.4达93.8%；开源模型中Gemma-4-31B最强，所有评估模型中Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview表现最佳。变形测试表明模型预测在语义保持变体下高度一致，说明结果不仅源于表面模式匹配。

Conclusion: 基础模型可以补充传统重构检查，通过标记可疑转换供开发者审查，且能提供简短解释辅助排查，无需显式编码重构特定规则，可作为轻量级开发工作流辅助工具。

Abstract: Refactoring tools in popular Integrated Development Environments (IDEs) can introduce unintended behavioral changes or compilation errors, a persistent challenge that undermines developer trust in automated transformations. Traditional detection approaches rely on handcrafted preconditions, and static and dynamic analyses, yet remain limited in adaptability and can miss subtle correctness issues. This study examines the potential of foundation models to serve as oracles for detecting refactoring bugs in Java programs. We evaluate zero-shot prompting, without task-specific training, across 226 real refactoring bugs collected over more than a decade from widely used Java IDEs (IntelliJ-IDEA, Eclipse, and NetBeans), spanning 47 refactoring types. Our results indicate that foundation models can be effective for this task, although performance varies across models. In the first-run setting, GPT-OSS-20B achieved 80.5% accuracy, while GPT-5.4 reached 93.8%. We also evaluated other open and proprietary models: Gemma-4-31B achieved the strongest result among open models, and Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview achieved the best overall result among all evaluated models. Metamorphic testing further shows that model predictions are largely consistent under intended semantics-preserving code variations, suggesting that superficial pattern matching may not fully account for the observed behavior. Beyond detection accuracy, foundation models can provide short explanations that may help support developer inspection, operate across refactoring types without explicitly encoded refactoring-specific rules, and may serve as lightweight triage aids in development workflows. Our findings suggest that foundation models can complement traditional refactoring checks by flagging suspicious transformations for developer inspection.

</details>


### [346] [A Shallow Embedding of Datalog in Lean](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02113)
*Ramy Shahin*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种在Lean proof assistant上浅层嵌入Datalog DSL的设计与实现，支持双向互操作，并将反向链接查询自动翻译为基于策略的定理证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Datalog作为一种轻量级逻辑编程语言，在推理算法上有成熟积累，但在Lean中直接编写Datalog风格的查询和定义不够简洁。作者希望将Datalog嵌入Lean，使得用户既可以利用Datalog的简洁性，又能与Lean的全功能证明能力双向互操作。

Method: 采用浅层嵌入（shallow embedding）方式，将Datalog作为领域特定语言（DSL）实现在Lean之上。除了支持规则和事实的编写，还将反向链接查询自动翻译为Lean中的定理，并生成基于策略（tactic）的证明。

Result: 完成了DSL的设计与实现，并通过三个简单示例展示了其可用性。

Conclusion: 该嵌入方法有效弥合了Datalog的简洁性与Lean的表达能力之间的鸿沟，实现了双向互操作，为在证明助手中使用逻辑编程提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Datalog is a lightweight logic programming language, based on the logic of Horn clauses. Lean, on the other hand, is a proof assistant system and language based on the Calculus of Inductive Constructions (CIC). Datalog is more constrained and less expressive than Lean but has a long history of established deduction algorithms. Writing definitions and queries in the Datalog fragment of Lean would be more succinct and understandable than writing them in Lean itself.
  This paper outlines the design and implementation of a shallow embedding of Datalog as a Domain Specific Language (DSL) on top of Lean. Bidirectional interoperability between the Datalog DSL and Lean is a primary goal of this design. In addition to rules and facts, backward chaining queries are automatically translated into theorems with tactic-based proofs. The paper also includes three simple examples of how the DSL can be used.

</details>


### [347] [DocSync: Agentic Documentation Maintenance via Critic-Guided Reflexion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02163)
*Sidhesh Badrinarayan,Adithya Parthasarathy*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DocSync 提出了一种结合 AST 表示与 RAG 的代理工作流，通过批判性自迭代循环实现文档与代码的结构一致性维护，在资源受限的小语言模型上显著优于传统基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件文档经常因代码演进而与可执行逻辑产生语义漂移，形成技术债务。现有静态分析工具无法检测语义一致性，而标准 LLM 缺乏代码结构感知，容易产生幻觉。

Method: DocSync 融合 AST 表示与 RAG 提供依赖感知的上下文，并引入基于 Reflexion 范式的批评引导迭代优化循环，使模型能够根据源代码自我修正生成的更新。

Result: 在资源受限的 LoRA 小语言模型上，DocSync 在语义对齐、摘要准确性和自动评判分数上显著优于 CodeT5-base 等基线，自动评判得分达3.44/5.0（基线为1.91）。迭代批评循环在不增加参数规模的情况下带来可测量的语义改进。

Conclusion: 将结构检索与代理化迭代优化相结合，是自主缓解文档债务的高度有前途的方向。

Abstract: Software documentation frequently drifts from executable logic as codebases evolve, creating technical debt that degrades maintainability and causes downstream API misuse. While static analysis tools can detect the absence of documentation, they cannot evaluate its semantic consistency. Conversely, standard Large Language Models (LLMs) offer generative flexibility but frequently hallucinate when updating documentation without deep structural awareness of the underlying code. To address this gap, we propose DocSync, an agentic workflow that frames documentation maintenance as a structurally grounded, iterative generation task. DocSync bridges syntactic changes and natural language descriptions by fusing Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) representations and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide dependency-aware context. Furthermore, to ensure factual consistency, we incorporate a critic-guided refinement loop based on the Reflexion paradigm, allowing the model to self-correct candidate updates against the source code. We empirically evaluate a resource-constrained implementation of DocSync-using a LoRA-adapted small language model - on a proxy code-to-text maintenance task. Our findings demonstrate that this AST-aware agentic approach substantially outperforms standard encoder-decoder baselines across semantic alignment, summary-line faithfulness, and automated judge preferences (e.g., achieving an automated judge score of 3.44/5.0 compared to 1.91 for CodeT5-base). Crucially, the iterative critic loop yields measurable improvements in semantic correctness without requiring scaled-up parameter counts. These results provide strong evidence that coupling structural retrieval with agentic refinement is a highly promising direction for autonomously mitigating documentation debt.

</details>


### [348] [Beyond Translation Accuracy: Addressing False Failures in LLM-Based Code Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02195)
*Fazle Rabbi,Soumit Kanti Saha,Jinqiu Yang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文揭示了代码翻译评估中的大量失败并非源于逻辑错误，而是由编译标志、库链接和运行时环境等评估框架本身的问题导致的假阴性。通过对5种语言、3个基准、6164个翻译样本的分析，作者区分了管道诱导失败和模型依赖行为，呼吁建立透明、配置感知的评估标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究集中于通过提示工程和迭代修复提升代码翻译准确率，但评估框架本身的可靠性却被忽视。大量翻译失败可能并非模型逻辑错误，而是评估环境配置不当导致的假阴性，这误导了研究者的判断方向。

Method: 大规模实证研究：选取5种编程语言（C/C++/Java/Python/Go）、3个基准（Avatar/CodeNet/EvalPlus）、3个LLM（GPT-4o/DeepSeek-Coder/Magicoder），共6164个翻译样本。系统分析并分类假阴性，区分管道诱导失败（影响所有模型）与模型依赖行为（因LLM而异）。

Result: 发现大量评估失败由编译标志错误、缺失库链接、运行时环境未配置等评估管道问题引起，而非模型逻辑缺陷。这些假阴性可分为两类：管道诱导失败（影响任何模型的一致性问题）和模型依赖行为（不同LLM表现各异）。

Conclusion: 现有代码翻译评估框架存在系统性的假阴性问题，亟需建立透明、配置感知的评估标准，以准确衡量LLM在代码翻译任务中的真实进展。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in automated code translation. While prior work has focused on improving translation accuracy through advanced prompting and iterative repair, the reliability of the underlying evaluation frameworks has received less attention. In this paper, we demonstrate that a significant number of reported failures in code translation are not due to incorrect logic, but rather evaluation-induced errors stemming from improper compilation flags, missing library links, and unconfigured runtime environments. We conduct a large-scale empirical study across five programming languages (C, C++, Java, Python, Go) and three benchmarks (Avatar, CodeNet, EvalPlus), covering 6,164 translations generated by GPT-4o, DeepSeek-Coder, and Magicoder. Our analysis identifies and categorizes common false negatives, distinguishing pipeline-induced failures that affect any model from model-dependent behaviors that vary across LLMs. Our findings highlight the necessity for transparent, configuration-aware evaluation standards to accurately assess progress in LLM-based code translation.

</details>


### [349] [HEJ-Robust: A Robustness Benchmark for LLM-Based Automated Program Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02215)
*Fazle Rabbi,Jinqiu Yang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文构建了HEJ-Robust鲁棒性基准测试，发现现有LLM-based程序修复模型在语义保持的代码变换下性能下降超过50%，表明模型缺乏对语法变异的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有程序修复基准测试仅评估单一规范形式的错误代码，无法反映真实软件中常见的语法变异，模型的鲁棒性未被充分检验。

Method: 基于HumanEval-Java-Bug，使用8种语义保持的代码变换构建包含1,450个变换实例的HEJ-Robust基准，评估5个微调LLM。

Result: 在多种变换下，模型性能下降超过50%，表明当前LLM修复模型对细微语法变异的鲁棒性不足。

Conclusion: LLM-based程序修复模型在面对语法变异时鲁棒性差，需要进一步研究以提高其在真实场景中的可靠性。

Abstract: Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on automated program repair across standard benchmarks. However, these benchmarks evaluate models on a single canonical form of buggy code and do not reflect the syntactic variations commonly observed in real-world software, leaving robustness largely unexamined. In this work, we construct HEJ-Robust, a robustness benchmark built from HumanEval-Java-Bug using eight semantics-preserving code transformations, resulting in 1,450 transformed instances. We evaluate five fine-tuned LLMs on this benchmark and show that model performance drops by over 50% under several transformations, indicating that current LLM-based repair models lack robustness to minor syntactic variations.

</details>


### [350] [The Conversations Beneath the Code: Triadic Data for Long-Horizon Software Engineering Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02244)
*Yelin Kim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文指出当前软件工程Agent在短期任务上表现饱和，但在需要长期规划、多工程师协作、模糊需求的高级工程任务上表现不佳。作者提出解决方案是收集"三元数据"（triadic data）：人类-人类对话（形成工程上下文）、人类-AI会话（消耗上下文）、跨职能团队的多周协作工作。并建议通过专家回溯性协议轨迹和模拟跨职能公司两种方式实现，同时提出四层证据框架来验证数据质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SWE Agent在短期基准测试中已饱和，但在高级软件工程任务（长期、多工程师协作、模糊规范）上表现倒退。作者认为这本质上是训练数据问题，现有数据源（GitHub数据、单Agent轨迹、人机对话日志）不足以培养高级工程能力。

Method: 提出"三元数据"概念：1）人类-人类对话（工程上下文形成过程）；2）人类-AI会话（上下文消费过程）；3）跨职能团队多周协作工作。两种具体实现方式：专家回溯性协议轨迹 + 模拟跨职能公司。配套四层证据框架：机械验证、统计语料特征刻画、探针实验、预先注册的盲审评估。

Result: 作者论证了该数据可在12-18个月内通过现有成熟方法收集完成，并声称这是解决Agent训练中四个开放问题的实证关键。

Conclusion: 软件工程Agent领域的近期研究议程应明确包含三元数据的收集与利用，这是从短期任务Agent迈向真正能胜任高级工程工作的Agent的关键。

Abstract: Frontier software engineering agents have saturated short-horizon benchmarks while regressing on the work that constitutes senior engineering: long-horizon, multi-engineer, ambiguous-specification deliverables. This paper takes a position on what training data is needed to close the gap. The substrate for the next generation of SWE agents is neither larger GitHub scrapes nor more solo-agent trajectories nor -- sufficient by itself -- open human-AI dialogue logs. It is triadic data: synchronized capture of the human-human conversations where engineering context is formed, the human-AI sessions where that context is partially consumed, and the multi-week cross-functional work that surrounds both. We argue that the canonical instantiation of triadic data is two complementary products: long-horizon expert trajectories captured under stimulated-recall protocols, and simulated cross-functional companies -- instrumented teams of senior engineers, product managers, designers, and data scientists working through ambiguous deliverables on shared infrastructure. We further specify a four-tier evidence framework through which any such corpus -- triadic or otherwise -- must justify its quality to a fine-tuning researcher: mechanical verification, statistical corpus characterization, probe experiments, and pre-registered blind evaluation. We argue that this data is capturable in 12-18 months with methods already mature in adjacent fields, that it is the empirical key to four open questions in agent training, and that the field's near-term research agenda should include it explicitly.

</details>


### [351] [CommitSuite: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Commit Classification and Message Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02256)
*Zirui Wan,Zhaonan Wu,Xinyi Hou,Yanjie Zhao,Pengcheng Xia,Haoyu Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了CommitSuite基准数据集（63,533条CCS规范提交），并设计了基于五项二元指标的无参考评估框架，实验表明LLM在提交信息生成与评估上均有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CCS提交分类与生成研究缺乏大规模基准、语义标注和可靠评估方法。

Method: 构建包含63,533条CCS提交、AST代码变更及LLM语义标注的基准；提出基于理性、全面性、非冗余性、真实性和逻辑性的无参考评估框架。

Result: LLM评估与人类判断达到0.849 Cohen's Kappa一致性。

Conclusion: CommitSuite为结构化提交理解和可复现研究提供了统一资源。

Abstract: High-quality commit messages are critical for maintaining software projects, yet ensuring their consistency and informativeness remains a practical challenge. While the Conventional Commits Specification (CCS) provides a structured format for commit messages, research on CCS-based commit classification and commit message generation (CMG) is limited by the absence of large-scale benchmarks, semantic annotations, and reliable evaluation methods. In this paper, we introduce CommitSuite, a benchmark comprising 63,533 CCS-compliant commits from 243 open-source repositories across seven programming languages. Each commit is labeled with its CCS type and enriched with AST-level code changes, along with LLM-assisted semantic annotations that capture the "what" and "why" behind the change. To evaluate CMG systems, we propose a reference-free framework based on five binary metrics: rationality, comprehensiveness, non-redundancy, authenticity, and logicality, enabling semantic-level assessment without relying on human-written references. Our experiments show that LLMs can effectively support both generation and evaluation, with evaluation achieving 0.849 Cohen's Kappa agreement against human judgments. CommitSuite offers a unified resource for structured commit understanding and facilitates reproducible research on commit classification and generation.

</details>


### [352] [These Aren't the Reviews You're Looking For How Humans Review AI-Generated Pull Requests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02273)
*Kacper Duma,Patryk Wróblewski,Jagoda Bobińska,Julia Winiarska,Piotr Przymus*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文分析了AI生成PR的代码审查过程，发现大多数AI生成的PR未被审查，且审查主要由AI代理而非人类完成，与人类作者PR的审查模式存在系统性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究AI生成的PR在GitHub上的代码审查交互模式，以及与人类作者PR的差异，理解在AI辅助工作流中审查指标作为人类监督指标的可靠性。

Method: 使用AIDev数据集，分析AI生成PR与人类作者PR的代码审查交互过程，对比审查参与方（人类vs AI代理）和交互形式。

Result: AI生成PR大多未被审查；被审查时主要由AI代理主导；人类作者PR更可能获得纯人类审查和直接反馈；AI生成PR的审查更多是自动化中介交互，人类参与常表现为代理引导而非独立评估。

Conclusion: AI生成PR与人类作者PR在审查活动结构上存在系统性差异，这对将审查指标作为大规模挖掘研究中人类监督的指标提出了挑战。

Abstract: We analyze code review interactions for AI-generated pull requests (PRs) on GitHub using the AIDev dataset and compare them to human-authored PRs within the same repositories. We find that most AI-generated PRs receive no review and, when reviewed, are largely dominated by AI agents rather than humans. Human-authored PRs are more likely to receive human-only review and to attract direct human feedback. In contrast, reviews of AI-generated PRs more often take the form of automation-mediated interaction, with human involvement frequently expressed through agent steering rather than standalone evaluation. These results indicate systematic differences in how review activity is structured in agentic workflows and raise challenges for interpreting review metrics as indicators of human oversight in large-scale mining studies.

</details>


### [353] [A Low-Code Approach for the Automatic Personalization of Conversational Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02384)
*Aaron Conrardy,Alfredo Capozucca,Jordi Cabot*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过系统文献综述(SLR)梳理了模型驱动工程(MDE)领域中用户建模的现状，发现现有研究分散、覆盖维度有限且多为静态，工具支持薄弱。作者提出未来路线图：建立统一可复用的用户模型，引入机器学习实现自动化增量式用户画像，并构建从用户分析到应用自适应的自动流水线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MDE领域中的用户建模研究目前缺乏系统性综述，现有方案彼此孤立、维度覆盖不全，亟需梳理现状并指出未来方向。

Method: 采用系统文献综述(SLR)方法，对MDE领域中用户建模的相关工作进行系统性梳理和分析。

Result: 发现现有提案分散、仅覆盖部分易画像维度；多数维度被视为静态而非动态演化；工具支持有限，主要局限于用户模型本身的创建。

Conclusion: 未来应建立覆盖全部维度的统一用户模型（可借鉴社会学等领域），发展基于ML的自动化增量式用户画像方法，以及能够将用户信息转化为具体应用适配的自动流水线。

Abstract: In this paper, we conducted an SLR on the state of user modeling in the MDE domain. Results show a diverse set of disconnected proposals, covering a partial number of dimensions with an emphasis on those characteristics that are easier to profile. Moreover, most dimensions are regarded as fixed instead of allowing their dynamic evolution during the interaction with the software application. It is also worth noting that tool support is also rather limited, mostly limited to enabling the creation of the user models itself.
  The roadmap we hope to see in this area stems from the discussion points seen above. For instance, we believe the community should agree on a unified and re-usable user model, covering the superset of all dimensions present in the literature. Plus additional ones we could learn from user profiling in other domains (e.g. sociology). On the technical side, we expect to see a new generation of ML-based proposals to automatically and incrementally derive a user profile from the analysis of user interactions and a number of automatic pipelines able to transform the user information in concrete application adaptations that personalize the application to cater to the user's needs and profile.

</details>


### [354] [AOCI: Symbolic-Semantic Indexing for Practical Repository-Scale Code Understanding with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02421)
*Jinshi Liu,Hanying Zuo,Congyin Cao,Anran Zhang,Yixuan Liu,Xinzhou Xie*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AOCI（AI导向代码索引），一种符号-语义结合的仓库级代码表示方法，使LLM能在单次读取中完整理解大型代码库。实验表明AOCI在2160次评估中超越所有可部署基线，在19个工业任务中零缺陷，而主流工具在12个任务中引入缺陷且消耗4-130倍token。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（检索、摘要、智能体探索）在查询时构建的代码库视图不稳定、不一致，缺乏系统性，导致LLM难以理解超大规模代码库。需要一种稳定、全面的仓库级代码表示。

Method: AOCI索引包含编码规则和条目，每个代码单元对应一个条目，由符号标签（架构坐标）和语义内容（功能、依赖、约束）组成。维护时增量更新，仅重新生成受影响的条目。

Result: 在4个项目、3种LLM、6种上下文条件下（2160次评估）AOCI超越所有可部署基线，仅次于Oracle上界。在19个工业任务中零缺陷，主流工具在12个任务中引入缺陷且消耗4-130倍token（p<0.001）。

Conclusion: AOCI提供了一种系统性的仓库级代码理解方案，优于现有方法，尤其在大规模、高复杂度任务中优势显著。

Abstract: Large language models struggle with understanding codebases beyond a certain scale -- repositories with hundreds of thousands of lines of code. Existing methods -- retrieval, summarization, agent exploration -- each construct a different view at query time. The view varies between runs, and what persists is typically ad-hoc rather than systematic. This paper introduces AOCI (AI-Oriented Code Indexing): a symbolic-semantic repository representation -- a structured blueprint that an LLM can read in a single pass to gain a complete repository-level picture of the system's architecture, dependencies, and key design decisions before any task. An AOCI index consists of encoding rules followed by entries, with one entry per code unit (file or database table). Each entry pairs a symbolic tag with semantic content. The symbolic component provides architectural coordinates; the semantic component carries function, dependencies, and constraints. Together they form a consistent, stable representation of the entire system. Index maintenance is incremental: when code changes, only affected entries are regenerated under protocol rules. The AOCI Platform automates this process, keeping the blueprint aligned with the code. We evaluated AOCI on four projects across three LLMs and six context conditions (2,160 evaluations). AOCI outperforms all deployable baselines and ranks second only to the Oracle upper bound in overall accuracy. On 19 industrial tasks across five systems, AOCI produced zero final-state defects, while three mainstream agent-based tools introduced defects in 12 tasks and consumed 4--130$\times$ more tokens ($p < 0.001$). The advantage grows with task complexity.

</details>


### [355] [ARIADNE: Agentic Reward-Informed Adaptive Decision Exploration via Blackboard-Driven MCTS for Competitive Program Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02431)
*Minnan Wei,Xiang Chen,Xiaoshuai Niu,Siyu Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于黑板驱动和蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的竞争性程序生成框架，通过五阶段协同工作流（策略选择、代码生成、测试生成、质量评估、代码修复）和共享黑板机制，显著提升了LLM在编程竞赛场景下的Pass@1性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM方法在竞争性程序生成中存在两大问题：一是缺乏显式算法规划和边缘情况处理，导致一次性生成不可靠；二是如何在有限计算预算下有效利用执行反馈进行迭代调试和优化，仍然具有挑战性。

Method: 提出{\tool}框架，将程序生成建模为序列决策过程，采用黑板驱动MCTS。工作流分为五个协调阶段：策略选择、代码生成、测试生成、质量评估和代码修复，并通过共享黑板积累结构化证据以指导后续决策。

Result: 在APPS、CodeContests、CodeContests+和LiveCodeBench四个基准上，{\tool}在所有LLM后端上均取得最佳Pass@1。使用GPT-4o时，Pass@1分别达到41.30、46.67、27.27和20.91，相比最强基线CodeSim最高提升26.06分；使用DeepSeek-V3.2时有进一步提升。

Conclusion: 将MCTS全局搜索与共享黑板上持久化证据积累相结合，能够实现系统性探索和有效反馈利用，显著增强LLM在竞争性程序生成中的能力。

Abstract: Competitive program generation aims to automatically produce correct and efficient solutions for programming-contest problems under strict time and memory constraints. Existing LLM-based approaches often fail to perform explicit algorithmic planning and to handle edge cases robustly, leading to unreliable one-shot generation. Moreover, although execution feedback is essential for iterative debugging and refinement, incorporating such feedback effectively within limited computational budgets remains difficult. To overcome these limitations, we propose {\tool}, a blackboard-driven Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) framework that models program generation as a sequential decision process. {\tool} organizes the generation workflow into five coordinated stages (i.e., strategy selection, code generation, test generation, quality evaluation, and code repair) while maintaining a shared blackboard that accumulates structured evidence to guide subsequent decisions. Experiments on four benchmarks (APPS, CodeContests, CodeContests+, and LiveCodeBench) show that {\tool} consistently achieves the best Pass@1 performance across multiple LLM backends. With GPT-4o, {\tool} attains Pass@1 scores of 41.30, 46.67, 27.27, and 20.91, surpassing the strongest baseline CodeSim by up to 26.06 points, while further improvements are observed with DeepSeek-V3.2. These results indicate that combining global search through MCTS with persistent evidence accumulation on a shared blackboard enables systematic exploration and effective feedback utilization, substantially enhancing the capability of LLMs in competitive program generation.

</details>


### [356] [Causal Software Engineering: A Vision and Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02454)
*Roberto Pietrantuono,Luca Giamattei,Stefano Russo,Julien Siebert,Neil Walkinshaw*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出因果软件工程（CSE）作为未来范式，利用因果模型和因果推理系统性地指导软件生命周期活动，以回答干预性和反事实问题，弥补现有相关性模型的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI驱动工具（如异常检测、预测分析、AIOps、LLM智能体）擅长发现相关性模式，但软件工程中许多关键决策是干预性或反事实性的（如变更负载均衡策略的影响、不同发布计划能否避免故障），相关性模型无法回答"如果我们采取行动会怎样"的问题。

Method: 提出因果软件工程（CSE）范式，包括：(i) 涵盖开发和运维的因果优先工作流视图；(ii) 工具和组织采纳的分阶段路线图；(iii) 用于衡量进展的评估与基准议程。

Result: 论文为CSE提供了概念框架、实施路线图和评估蓝图，尚未给出具体实验结果，属于前瞻性方法论论文。

Conclusion: 因果软件工程有望通过显式假设、不确定性感知的效应估计和反事实诊断，增强现有软件工程实践，使工程师能在不确定环境下做出更优的高风险决策。

Abstract: Software engineering increasingly involves making high-stakes decisions under uncertainty, using signals from code, field data, and socio-technical processes. Recent AI-driven support (e.g., anomaly detection, predictive analytics, AIOps, as well as LLM-based agents) has amplified engineers' ability to detect patterns and synthesize content and recommendations, but many critical questions are interventional or counterfactual: What is the expected impact of changing a load-balancing strategy? Would an outage have been avoided under a different release plan? Correlational models answer "what tends to co-occur"; they struggle to answer "what would happen if we act." We propose Causal Software Engineering (CSE) as a future paradigm in which causal models and causal reasoning systematically inform activities across the software lifecycle, augmenting existing practices with explicit assumptions, uncertainty-aware effect estimates, and counterfactual diagnosis. We outline (i) a causal-first workflow view spanning development and operations, (ii) a staged roadmap for tools and organizational adoption, and (iii) an evaluation and benchmark agenda for measuring progress.

</details>


### [357] [LLM-Assisted Repository-Level Generation with Structured Spec-Driven Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02455)
*Shuzhao Feng,Boqi Chen,Brett H Meyer,Gunter Mussbacher*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出结构化规范驱动工程（SSDE）范式，通过结构化工件引导LLM生成仓库级代码，解决当前自然语言提示在代码生成中的模糊性和不可验证性问题。通过MVC业务逻辑的初步实验验证了其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在函数级代码生成表现优异，但在仓库级系统扩展时质量显著下降；纯自然语言提示存在固有歧义且缺乏可验证性。

Method: 提出SSDE范式，利用结构化规范作为LLM输入来引导代码生成；通过五个LLM在三个软件系统上生成MVC业务逻辑进行初步可行性研究。

Result: 初步实验表明结构化规范作为输入能够提升仓库级代码生成的质量和可验证性。

Conclusion: SSDE使高质量仓库级代码生成成为可实现目标，同时提供优越的可验证性，但还需进一步研究挑战和未来路线。

Abstract: State-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in code generation at the function level. However, the output quality significantly declines when scaling to repository-level systems. Current workflows relying only on natural language prompts suffer from inherent ambiguity and a lack of verifiability. To address this, we propose structured spec-driven engineering (SSDE), a paradigm that leverages structured artifacts to guide LLM generation. We argue that structured specifications as LLM inputs make high-quality, repository-level code generation a tangible goal, while at the same time offering superior verifiability, leading to significant potential for improvement. We first investigate the feasibility of this vision through a pilot study generating Model-View-Controller (MVC) business logic for three software systems using five LLMs, and then highlight the potential, challenges, and future roadmap for SSDE.

</details>


### [358] [AI-Generated Smells: An Analysis of Code and Architecture in LLM and Agent-Driven Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02741)
*Yuecai Zhu,Nikolaos Tsantalis,Peter C. Rigby*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统审计了AI生成代码中的技术债务，发现AI模型越强，生成的代码越臃肿、耦合度越高，且功能正确性和详细提示都无法缓解这种架构退化，提出了“体量-质量反比定律”。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究过度关注AI代码的功能正确性，忽视了长期可维护性这一关键问题，作者希望通过系统审计揭示AI生成软件中的技术债务特征。

Method: 采用多尺度分析，从单文件算法任务到复杂智能体生成的系统，通过审计技术债务指标进行系统性评估。

Result: 发现了推理-复杂度权衡：模型能力越强，代码越臃肿耦合；建立了体量-质量反比定律，代码体积近乎完美预测结构退化；功能正确性和详细提示均无法缓解此问题。

Conclusion: 未来AI软件工程的进步需要赋予智能体明确的架构预见能力，确保生成的软件不仅功能正确而且可维护。

Abstract: The promise of Large Language Models in automated software engineering is often measured by functional correctness, overlooking the critical issue of long term maintainability. This paper presents a systematic audit of technical debt in AI-generated software, revealing that AI does not eliminate flaws but rather introduces a distinct machine signature of defects. Our multi-scale analysis, spanning single-file algorithmic tasks and complex, agent generated systems, identifies a fundamental Reasoning-Complexity Trade-off: as models become more capable, they generate increasingly bloated and coupled code. This architectural decay is so pronounced that we establish a Volume-Quality Inverse Law, where code volume is a near perfect predictor of structural degradation. Crucially, we demonstrate that neither functional correctness nor detailed prompting mitigates this decay. These findings challenge the current paradigm of prompt-driven generation, reframing the central problem of AI-based software engineering from one of code generation to one of architectural complexity management. We conclude that future progress depends on equipping agents with explicit architectural foresight to ensure the software they build is not just functional, but also maintainable.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [359] [2026 Roadmap on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Smart Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00839)
*Jay Lee,Hanqi Su,Marco Macchi,Adalberto Polenghi,Wei Wu,Zhiheng Zhao,George Q. Huang,Kiva Allgood,Devendra Jain,Benedikt Gieger,Vibhor Pandhare,Soumyabrata Bhattacharjee,Ram Mohril,Lingbao Kong,Qiyuan Wang,Xinlan Tang,Sungjong Kim,Chan Hee Park,Byeng D. Youn,Guo Dong Goh,Xi Huang,Wai Yee Yeong,Yung C Shin,He Zhang,Zitong Wang,Fei Tao,Jagjit Singh Srai,Satyandra K. Gupta,Byung Gun Joung,Albin John,John W. Sutherland,Sang Won Lee,Olga Fink,Vinay Sharma,Faez Ahmed,Wei Chen,Mark Fuge,Arild Waaler,Martin G. Skjæveland,Dimitris Kyritsis,Wei Chen,VispiNevile Karkaria,Yi-Ping Chen,Ying-Kuan Tsai,Joseph Cohen,Xun Huan,Jing Lin,Liangwei Zhang,Gregory W. Vogl,Aaron W. Cornelius,Xiaodong Jia,Dai-Yan Ji,Takanobu Minami,Ruoxin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统性地梳理了AI/ML在智能制造中的基础、应用与新兴方向，涵盖工业大数据分析、数字孪生、生成式AI、物理信息AI等关键主题，分析了当前挑战并提出了未来发展路线图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI/ML正在重塑智能制造，但在工业场景中仍面临工业大数据复杂性、异构系统集成、可信解释性等关键挑战，亟需系统性的路线图来指导研究与实践。

Method: 本文以路线图形式组织，分三部分：第一部分阐述AI在智能制造中的基础与趋势；第二部分聚焦已取得进展的关键主题；第三部分探索非传统ML方法的新前沿。

Result: 识别了AI/ML在智能制造各领域中的机遇与剩余障碍，概述了方法、集成策略和工业采纳方面所需的进展。

Conclusion: 该路线图旨在为研究人员、工程师和从业者提供指导，加速创新，协调学术界与工业界优先级，确保AI驱动的智能制造实现可靠、可持续、可扩展的影响力。

Abstract: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) is reshaping smart manufacturing by providing new capabilities for efficiency, adaptability, and autonomy across industrial value chains. However, the deployment of AI and ML in industrial settings still faces critical challenges, including the complexity of industrial big data, effective data management, integration with heterogeneous sensing and control systems, and the demand for trustworthy, explainable, and reliable operation in high-stakes industrial environments. In this roadmap, we present a comprehensive perspective on the foundations, applications, and emerging directions of AI and ML in smart manufacturing. It is structured in three parts. The first highlights the foundations and trends that frame the evolution of AI in smart manufacturing. The second focuses on key topics where AI is already enabling advances, including industrial big data analytics, advanced sensing and perception, autonomous systems, additive and laser-based manufacturing, digital twins, robotics, supply chain and logistics optimization, and sustainable manufacturing. The third section explores non-traditional ML approaches that are opening new frontiers, such as physics-informed AI, generative AI, semantic AI, advanced digital twins, explainable AI, RAMS, data-centric metrology, LLMs, and foundation models for highly connected and complex manufacturing systems. By identifying both opportunities and remaining barriers across these areas, this roadmap outlines the advances needed in methods, integration strategies, and industrial adoption. We hope this roadmap will serve as a guide for researchers, engineers, and practitioners to accelerate innovation, align academic and industrial priorities, and ensure that AI-driven smart manufacturing delivers reliable, sustainable, and scalable impact for the future of manufacturing ecosystems.

</details>


### [360] [AI Agents for Sustainable SMEs: A Green ESG Assessment Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00841)
*Viet Trinh,Tan Nguyen,Minh-Huyen Phan,Quan Luu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于AI的框架，用于评估欧洲中小企业的ESG表现。第一阶段从Flash Eurobarometer FL549调查数据中建立专家验证的ESG基线分数；第二阶段基于n8n自动化平台构建可扩展的AI代理系统，利用大语言模型进行自动ESG分类并生成上下文建议。结果表明AI系统与人工输出高度一致，支持更有效的监控和干预策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欧洲中小企业需要一种高效、可扩展的ESG评估方法，以支持欧洲绿色协议的实施，但传统人工评估成本高、效率低。

Method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段基于Flash Eurobarometer FL549调查数据，由专家验证建立ESG基线分数；第二阶段使用n8n自动化平台构建AI代理系统，结合大语言模型进行自动化ESG分类和推荐生成。

Result: AI系统与人工评估结果高度一致，证明该方法能够有效支持监测和干预策略。

Conclusion: 该AI驱动框架为欧洲中小企业的ESG评估提供了可扩展、高效且可靠的解决方案，有助于推进欧洲绿色协议目标。

Abstract: This study presents a novel, AI-driven framework for assessing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance in European small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). An initial phase established expert-validated ESG baseline scores from a subset of the Flash Eurobarometer FL549 survey data. In the second phase, a scalable AI agent system, built on the n8n automation platform, applied these baselines to perform automated ESG classification and generate contextual recommendations using large language models (LLMs). The results demonstrate the AI system's high consistency with human-derived outputs, thereby supporting more effective monitoring and intervention strategies aligned with the European Green Deal.

</details>


### [361] [Understanding Emergent Misalignment via Feature Superposition Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00842)
*Gouki Minegishi,Hiroki Furuta,Takeshi Kojima,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，在无关任务上微调大语言模型可能意外诱发有害行为（突发性对齐失败），其根本原因是特征叠加的几何结构——放大目标特征时会无意中强化邻近的有害特征。作者通过梯度推导、多模型实验（Gemma-2/LLaMA-3.1/GPT-OSS）和稀疏自编码器分析验证了这一机制，并提出基于几何距离的过滤方法，将有害行为降低34.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有大量实证表明微调窄域、无害任务可诱导大模型产生有害行为（突发性对齐失败），但其背后的机制尚未明确。本文旨在从特征叠加的几何角度揭示这一现象的根本原因。

Method: 提出基于特征叠加几何结构的理论框架，给出梯度层面的推导；在Gemma-2（2B/9B/27B）、LLaMA-3.1 8B、GPT-OSS 20B等多个模型上实验验证；利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）识别与诱导数据及有害行为相关的特征，并测量其几何距离；提出基于几何感知的训练样本过滤方法。

Result: 有害相关特征与诱导数据特征在几何上更接近；该趋势在健康、职业、法律等多个领域泛化成立；几何感知的过滤方法将有害行为降低34.5%，显著优于随机移除，效果与LLM裁判过滤方法相当或略优。

Conclusion: 突发性对齐失败可归因于特征叠加的几何结构，这为理解和缓解该现象提供了理论基础和实践方法。

Abstract: Emergent misalignment, where fine-tuning on narrow, non-harmful tasks induces harmful behaviors, poses a key challenge for AI safety in LLMs. Despite growing empirical evidence, its underlying mechanism remains unclear. To uncover the reason behind this phenomenon, we propose a geometric account based on the geometry of feature superposition. Because features are encoded in overlapping representations, fine-tuning that amplifies a target feature also unintentionally strengthens nearby harmful features in accordance with their similarity. We give a simple gradient-level derivation of this effect and empirically test it in multiple LLMs (Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B, LLaMA-3.1 8B, GPT-OSS 20B). Using sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we identify features tied to misalignment-inducing data and to harmful behaviors, and show that they are geometrically closer to each other than features derived from non-inducing data. This trend generalizes across domains (e.g., health, career, legal advice). Finally, we show that a geometry-aware approach, filtering training samples closest to toxic features, reduces misalignment by 34.5%, substantially outperforming random removal and achieving comparable or slightly lower misalignment than LLM-as-a-judge-based filtering. Our study links emergent misalignment to feature superposition, providing a basis for understanding and mitigating this phenomenon.

</details>


### [362] [ClinicBot: A Guideline-Grounded Clinical Chatbot with Prioritized Evidence RAG and Verifiable Citations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00846)
*Navapat Nananukul,Mayank Kejriwal*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ClinicBot是一个基于多代理RAG的AI系统，通过结构化提取临床指南、按临床重要性排序证据、提供可验证答案，解决了LLM在医疗场景中的幻觉问题，并将在糖尿病诊疗中演示其效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床诊断需要准确、可验证且基于官方指南的回答，但大语言模型容易产生幻觉，现有RAG系统对所有证据同等对待，导致上下文嘈杂、答案泛化，不符合临床实践要求。

Method: (1) 将临床指南结构化提取为语义单元（推荐意见、表格、定义、叙述）并附带显式来源；(2) 基于临床重要性和指南结构而非文本相似度对证据进行优先级排序；(3) 构建网页界面提供简洁可操作的答案及可验证证据。

Result: 论文尚未给出完整实验结果，但计划通过真实患者的糖尿病问题和基于ADA 2025标准的糖尿病风险评估工具进行演示，展示语义知识提取和分层证据排序在多代理环境下处理大规模临床指南的可靠性。

Conclusion: ClinicBot通过结构化知识提取和分层证据排序，能够在多代理设置下可靠地处理复杂临床指南，为临床诊断提供准确、可验证的AI支持。

Abstract: Clinical diagnosis requires answers that are accurate, verifiable, and explicitly grounded in official guidelines. While large language models excel at natural language processing, their tendency to hallucinate undermines their utility in high-stakes medical contexts where precision is essential. Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems treat all evidence equally, producing noisy context and generic answers misaligned with clinical practice. We present ClinicBot, an AI system that translates guideline recommendations into trustworthy clinical support through three key advances: (1) structured extraction of clinical guidelines into semantic units (recommendations, tables, definitions, narrative) with explicit provenance, (2) evidence prioritization that ranks content by clinical significance and guideline structure rather than textual similarity, and (3) a web-based interface that presents concise, actionable answers with verifiable evidence. We will demonstrate ClinicBot using diabetes questions from real patients and an additional diabetes risk assessment tool that is faithful to the American Diabetes Association (ADA) Standards of Care in Diabetes (2025). The demonstration will illustrate how semantic knowledge extraction and hierarchical evidence ranking can reliably operate in a multi-agent setting to process complex clinical guidelines at scale.

</details>


### [363] [Accelerating battery research with an AI interface between FINALES and Kadi4Mat](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00909)
*Giovanna Tosato,Leon Merker,Monika Vogler,Michael Selzer,Arnd Koeppe*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究提出一个跨平台互操作框架（FINALES + Kadi4Mat），通过多目标批量贝叶斯优化，在减少实验次数的同时，探索钠离子电池化成时间与寿命终止性能之间的权衡，并逼近帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 钠离子电池化成过程耗时过长，严重影响电池寿命和实验效率。现有方法实验资源消耗大、发现速度慢，亟需一种高效的优化方案。

Method: 构建FINALES与Kadi RDM两大生态系统的互操作框架：FINALES协调实验规划与执行（POLiS MAP平台），Kadi4Mat中的主动学习代理采用多目标批量贝叶斯优化指导实验选择，迭代探索化成时间与EOL性能的权衡空间。

Result: 成功识别出逼近帕累托前沿的候选解决方案，证明了跨平台互操作基础设施在数据驱动优化中的有效性。

Conclusion: 该互操作框架不仅优化了钠离子电池化成协议，还建立了一种可迁移到其他材料科学与工程优化任务的方法论，支持跨研究中心的分布式协作。

Abstract: The time-consuming formation process critically impacts the longevity of sodium-ion coin cells and End Of Life (EOL) performance. This study aims to optimize formation protocols for duration efficiency, targeting high-performance outcomes while minimizing the number of experiments to reduce resource consumption and accelerate discovery. Specifically, we consider two potentially competing objectives: minimizing formation time and maximizing EOL performance. Beyond this application focus, we also present a methodological contribution: a framework designed to enable interoperability between the FINALES and Kadi RDM ecosystems, which we employ to tackle our optimization problem. In this setup, the FINALES framework orchestrates experiment planning and execution on the POLiS MAP, while an active-learning agent implemented within Kadi4Mat guides experiment selection, using multi-objective batched Bayesian optimization to efficiently explore the parameter space. This interoperability enhancement enables coordinated, distributed collaboration across automated systems and human-operated workflows, bridging multiple research centers. Using this approach, we iteratively explore the trade-off between formation time and EOL performance and identify candidate solutions approximating the Pareto front. The resulting workflow demonstrates the capability of interoperable infrastructures to facilitate data-driven optimization in battery research, and establishes a transferable framework applicable to diverse materials science and engineering optimization tasks.

</details>


### [364] [Effect-Transparent Governance for AI Workflow Architectures: Semantic Preservation, Expressive Minimality, and Decidability Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01030)
*Alan L. McCann*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文使用 Rocq 证明助手形式化验证了结构化AI工作流架构中，效应级治理（governance）可以在不降低内部计算表达能力的前提下实现，并建立了7条关键性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在AI工作流系统中，如何在不牺牲计算表达能力的前提下实施有效治理（如安全约束、权限控制）是一个核心挑战。本文希望证明治理与计算表达能力是正交维度。

Method: 使用Interaction Trees形式化方法，在Rocq 8.19中定义治理算子G，对所有效应指令（内存访问、外部调用、LLM查询）进行中介。整个形式化开发包含36个模块、~12,000行Rocq代码和454条定理，零 admitted lemmas。

Result: 建立了7条性质：(P1) 治理下的图灵完备性；(P2) 治理下的预言机表达能力；(P3) 可判定性边界；(P4) 允许执行的目标保持；(P5) 原语能力的最小表达性；(P6) 结构治理严格包含内容级过滤；(P7) 语义透明性。

Conclusion: 治理与计算表达能力是正交维度：治理约束程序的效应边界，同时对内部计算保持语义透明。这为AI工作流的安全治理提供了形式化基础。

Abstract: We present a machine-checked formalization of structurally governed AI workflow architectures and prove that effect-level governance can be imposed without reducing internal computational expressivity. Using Interaction Trees in Rocq 8.19, we define a governance operator G that mediates all effectful directives, including memory access, external calls, and oracle (LLM) queries. Our development compiles with 0 admitted lemmas and consists of 36 modules, ~12,000 lines of Rocq, and 454 theorems. We establishseven properties: (P1) governed Turing completeness, (P2) governed oracle expressivity, (P3) a decidability boundary in which governance predicates are total and closed under Boolean composition while semantic program properties remain non-trivial and undecidable by governance, (P4) goal preservation for permitted executions, (P5) expressive minimality of primitive capabilities (compute, memory, reasoning, external call, observability), (P6) subsumption asymmetry showing structural governance strictly subsumes content-level filtering, and (P7) semantic transparency: on all executions where governance permits, the governed interpretation is observationally equivalent (modulo governance-only events) to the ungoverned interpretation. Together, these results show that governance and computational expressivity are orthogonal dimensions: governance constrains the effect boundary of programs while remaining semantically transparent to internal computation.

</details>


### [365] [Algebraic Semantics of Governed Execution: Monoidal Categories, Effect Algebras, and Coterminous Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01032)
*Alan L. McCann*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于代数的治理执行语义，通过三条公理（安全性、透明性、适当地）定义治理代数，构建对称幺半范畴，实现可表达性与治理的共延边界，并在BEAM运行时上通过70,000+随机测试验证了行为等价性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的治理执行缺乏形式化、组合化的代数语义，无法在保障治理属性的同时保持表达的完备性，亟需一个既能表达所有可治理程序、又能确保所有可表达程序都受治理的统一框架。

Method: 基于交互树和参数化余归纳，定义三公理治理代数记录（安全性、透明性、适当地），构造对称幺半范畴（验证五边形、三角形、六边形协调性）；设计代数效应系统约束handler代数，确保只有治理保持的handler可构造；通过能力索引组合实现带机器检查能力边界的程序组合；提取OCaml代码作为BEAM运行时的NIF。

Result: 32个Rocq模块（约12,000行，454个定理，0 admitted）；证明共延边界定理（可表达 ⇔ 可治理）；证明Turing完备性在治理内保持；未中介I/O被排除在治理片段之外；提取的OCaml在BEAM上通过70,000+随机输入属性测试，零不一致。

Conclusion: 治理代数是参数化的：任何实例化三条公理的系统都继承所有导出性质（收敛性、组合闭包、目标保持）；治理拒绝被建模为安全的余归纳发散；该工作为可治理系统的形式化组合化设计提供了坚实的代数基础。

Abstract: We present an algebraic semantics for governed execution in which governance is axiomatized, compositional, and coterminous with expressibility. The framework, mechanized in 32 Rocq modules (~12,000 lines, 454 theorems, 0 admitted), is built on interaction trees and parameterized coinduction. A three-axiom GovernanceAlgebra record (safety, transparency, properness) induces a symmetric monoidal category with verified pentagon, triangle, and hexagon coherence, where every tensor composition preserves governance. An algebraic effect system constrains the handler algebra so that only governance-preserving handlers can be constructed in the safe fragment; programs in the empty capability set provably emit only observability directives. Capability-indexed composition bundles programs with machine-checked capability bounds, and a dual guarantee theorem establishes that within_caps and gov_safe hold simultaneously under all composition operators. The capstone result is the coterminous boundary: within our formal model, every program expressible via the four primitive morphism constructors is governed under interpretation, and every governed program is the image of such a program. Turing completeness is preserved inside governance; unmediated I/O is excluded from the governed fragment. Governance denial is modeled as safe coinductive divergence. The governance algebra is parametric: any system instantiating the three axioms inherits all derived properties, including convergence, compositional closure, and goal preservation. Extracted OCaml runs as a NIF in the BEAM runtime, with property-based testing (70,000+ random inputs, zero disagreements) confirming behavioral equivalence between the specification and the runtime interpreter.

</details>


### [366] [A Knowledge-Driven LLM-Based Decision-Support System for Explainable Defect Analysis and Mitigation Guidance in Laser Powder Bed Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01100)
*Basit Mahmud Shahriar,Md Habibor Rahman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种知识驱动的决策支持系统，将结构化缺陷知识与LLM推理相结合，用于LPBF制造的缺陷诊断与缓解指导。系统基于27种缺陷类型的知识库，支持模糊查询、多模态图像评估，实验表明完全集成配置达到了0.808的F1分数，具有良好的一致性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LPBF等安全关键制造过程中，缺陷诊断需要专业领域知识，而现有通用LLM缺乏结构化知识，导致解释不一致、实用性差。作者希望通过本体引导的知识表示来提升LLM辅助缺陷分析的 consistency、interpretability 和 practical usefulness。

Method: 1) 构建包含27种LPBF缺陷类型的本体知识库；2) 集成LLM进行模糊自然语言查询、知识检索、缺陷解释与缓解建议；3) 基于基础模型的多模态图像评估模块，通过语义对齐评分进行微观缺陷图像描述符引导的解读；4) 与通用视觉-语言模型进行定性比较、消融实验和Cohen's kappa一致性分析。

Result: 完全集成配置在文献衍生数据集上macro-average F1达到0.808，优于其他三种配置；Cohen's kappa分析显示模型输出与文献参考标签之间具有substantial agreement（高度一致性）。

Conclusion: 本体引导的知识表示能够有效提升LLM辅助LPBF缺陷分析的一致性、可解释性和实用性，为制造领域知识驱动决策支持系统的设计提供了有效范式。

Abstract: This work presents a knowledge-driven decision-support system that integrates structured defect knowledge with LLM-based reasoning to provide explainable defect diagnosis and mitigation guidance in manufacturing, using LPBF as a representative, safety-critical case study. The proposed ontology-integrated LLM-based decision support system for LPBF defect analysis and mitigation guidance is built on a knowledge base containing 27 known LPBF defect types organized into hierarchical categories and causal relationships. The developed system supports fuzzy natural language queries for systematic knowledge retrieval, literature-supported explanation of defects, and guidance on defect causes and mitigation strategies derived from encoded process knowledge. Furthermore, a multimodal image-assessment module based on foundation models enables descriptor-guided interpretation of representative microscopic defect images through semantic alignment scoring. The proposed framework was evaluated through qualitative comparisons with general-purpose vision-language models, an ablation study, and an inter-rater reliability analysis. Evaluation on the literature-derived dataset showed that the fully integrated configuration outperformed the other three evaluated system configurations, achieving a macro-average F1 score of 0.808. Additionally, inter-rater reliability analysis using Cohen's kappa indicated substantial agreement between the model outputs and the literature-derived reference labels. These findings suggest that ontology-guided knowledge representation can improve the consistency, interpretability, and practical usefulness of LLM-assisted LPBF defect analysis.

</details>


### [367] [Virtual Speech Therapist: A Clinician-in-the-Loop AI Speech Therapy Agent for Personalized and Supervised Therapy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01101)
*Shakeel Sheikh,Patrick Marmaroli,MD Sahidullah,Slim Ouni,Fabrice Hirsch,Goncalo Leal,Bjorn W Schuller*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出虚拟言语治疗师（VST），一种基于智能体的平台，通过自动化AI工作流程简化口吃评估并制定个性化治疗方案。VST集成深度学习口吃分类与多智能体大语言模型推理，由专家评估证实能生成高质量的循证治疗方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统口吃评估和治疗方案制定依赖专业言语治疗师，耗时长、成本高，且难以推广。现有自动化方法缺乏临床推理能力和个性化方案生成能力，无法有效减轻治疗师负担。作者旨在开发一个集评估与治疗规划于一体的AI平台，在保持"临床医生在环"的前提下提升效率。

Method: VST包含三个核心模块：1) 语音采集与特征提取；2) 基于深度学习的口吃类型分类；3) 多智能体LLM推理流程——由专门智能体自主生成、批判并迭代优化治疗方案，其中批评智能体评估方案的安全性、方法论合理性与循证一致性。最终方案经临床医生审查反馈后生成可交付患者的治疗计划。

Result: 专家言语治疗师的实验评估确认，VST能够持续生成高质量、基于证据的治疗建议，表明该系统有潜力增强临床工作流程、减轻治疗师负担。

Conclusion: VST成功将深度学习分类与多智能体LLM推理结合，通过"临床医生在环"设计在自动化与临床安全之间取得平衡，有望改善言语障碍患者的治疗效果。论文提供了在线交互界面以供实时评估与个性化治疗规划。

Abstract: This paper develops Virtual Speech Therapist (VST), an intelligent agent-based platform that streamlines stuttering assessment and delivers customized therapy planning through automated and adaptive AI-driven workflows. VST integrates state-of-the-art deep learning-based stuttering classification, and multi-agent large language model (LLM) reasoning to support evidence-based clinical decision-making. The VST begins with the acquisition and feature extraction of patient speech samples, followed by robust classification of stuttering types. Building on these outputs, VST initiates an agentic reasoning process in which specialized LLM agents autonomously generate, critique, and iteratively refine individualized therapy plans. A dedicated critic agent evaluates all generated therapy plans to ensure clinical safety, methodological soundness, and alignment with peer-reviewed evidence and established professional guidelines. The resulting output is a comprehensive, patient-specific therapy draft intended for clinician review. Incorporating clinician feedback, the system then produces a finalized therapy plan suitable for patient delivery, thereby maintaining a clinician-in-the-loop paradigm. Experimental evaluation by expert speech therapists confirms that VST consistently generates high-quality, evidence-based therapy recommendations. These findings demonstrate the system's potential to augment clinical workflows, reduce clinician burden, and improve therapeutic outcomes for individuals with speech impairments. An interactive user interface for the proposed system is available online at: https://vocametrix.com/ai/stuttering-therapy-planning-agent , facilitating real-time stuttering assessment and personalized therapy planning.

</details>


### [368] [Towards Multi-Agent Autonomous Reasoning in Hydrodynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01102)
*Jinpai Zhao,Albert Cerrone,Joannes Westerink,Clint Dawson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于层执行图（LEG）的多智能体系统（MAS）用于水动力学，通过专用代理协同工作（规划器、专家、整合器、报告员）替代单代理系统，在37个查询上达到93.6%的事实精度和100%通过率，并展现出良好的可扩展性和优雅降级能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单代理系统在LLM驱动的科学工作流中存在上下文饱和瓶颈——随着工具规范和观测轨迹累积，有效上下文减少，端到端可靠性下降。

Method: 提出基于层执行图（LEG）的多代理系统：规划代理利用自然语言路由启发式构建查询特定的执行拓扑；专业代理在严格工具白名单下运行；整合代理融合并行输出为简洁简报；报告代理合成最终响应；运行时记录每次工具调用的来源。

Result: 在37个跨6类复杂度查询上，达到93.6%事实精度和100%通过率；从单线程到5条独立并行轨道的准确率均保持在90%以上；模拟单个数据源丢失时系统优雅降级，仍能返回实质性部分答案。

Conclusion: 规划引导的图结构多代理编排可以有效缓解制约单代理架构的上下文饱和瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Single-agent systems (SAS) have become the default pattern for LLM-driven scientific workflows, but routing planning, tool use, and synthesis through a single context window comes with a well-known cost: as tool specifications and observational traces accumulate, the effective context available for each decision shrinks, and end-to-end reliability suffers. We present a multi-agent system (MAS) prototype for hydrodynamics in which specialized agents are coordinated through a Layer Execution Graph (LEG). A planner agent constructs query-specific execution topologies from natural-language routing heuristics that capture domain knowledge without hard-coding it as rigid control logic; specialist agents operate under strict tool allowlists and occupy complementary data-class roles. Between layers, consolidator agents fuse parallel outputs into concise briefs, and a reporter agent synthesizes the final response, while the runtime logs provenance for every tool invocation to support auditability. All benchmarks, ablations, and stress tests use Claude Sonnet~4.6 as the backbone model for both specialist and general-purpose agents. Evaluated on 37 queries spanning six complexity categories, the prototype achieves 93.6% factual precision with a 100% pass rate. Accuracy remains above 90% across runs from single-threaded to five independent parallel tracks, and under simulated loss of individual data sources the system degrades gracefully, still returning substantive partial answers. Together, these results suggest that planner-guided, graph-structured multi-agent orchestration can meaningfully alleviate the context-saturation bottlenecks that constrain monolithic single-agent architectures.

</details>


### [369] [New Bounds for Zarankiewicz Numbers via Reinforced LLM Evolutionary Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01120)
*Jay Bhan,Nicole Nobili,Srinivasan Raghuraman,Patrick Langer*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文利用基于大语言模型的进化算法OpenEvolve，首次精确确定了三个Zarankiewicz数（Z(11,21,3,3)=116, Z(11,22,3,3)=121, Z(12,22,3,3)=132），并为另外41个Zarankiewicz数建立了下界，其中多个与已知上界仅差一条边。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Zarankiewicz数是极值图论中一个经典但长期未完全解决的问题，作者希望通过新的计算手段攻克此前未能确定精确值的几个关键参数组合。

Method: 采用OpenEvolve这一基于大语言模型的开源进化算法，通过迭代改进数学构造生成算法，并针对Zarankiewicz问题定制奖励信号来优化搜索。

Result: 首次精确确定了三个Zarankiewicz数的值（116、121、132）；为41个参数组合建立了更强的下界；在4个情形中匹配了已知最优值；所有计算成本不到每个参数组合30美元。

Conclusion: LLM引导的进化搜索是一种廉价、可复现且易于使用的工具，能够为组合数学中的新构造发现提供有力支持。
